34305.title: The Impact of Carcinogenic Risk Exposure on Housing Values: Estimates From Chemical Reclassifications
34305.zh_title: 致癌风险暴露对住房价值的影响：基于化学物质重新分类的估计
34305.authors: Jules H. van Binsbergen, João F. Cocco, Marco Grotteria, S. Lakshmi Naaraayanan
34305.abstract: We quantify the impact of perceived cancer risk on housing values using widely advertised national reclassifications of chemical carcinogenicity in the United States. Combining these information events with an empirical design that compares changes in house values closer to affected toxic plants against those farther away isolates the effect of cancer risk news from other local factors. Focusing on plants previously emitting reclassified carcinogenic chemicals, we estimate a 1-2% decline in housing values within a 3-mile radius compared to those located farther away. The effects are stronger in areas with higher media presence underscoring the role of salience as a mechanism.
34305.zh_abstract: 我们利用美国全国范围内广泛宣传的化学致癌性重新分类事件，量化了感知癌症风险对住房价值的影响。将这些信息事件与一种实证设计相结合，该设计比较了靠近受影响有毒工厂的房屋价值变化与远离这些工厂的房屋价值变化，从而将癌症风险新闻的影响与其他地方性因素分离开来。聚焦于之前排放过被重新分类的致癌化学物质的工厂，我们估计，与位于更远距离的房屋相比，3英里半径内的住房价值下降了1-2%。在媒体曝光度更高的地区，这种影响更强，这凸显了显著性作为一种机制的作用。
34305.meta: Programs：AP, CF, EEE, EH；JEL：G11, G50, Q51, Q53

34304.title: Maternity Leave Extensions and Gender Gaps: Evidence from an Online Job Platform
34304.zh_title: 产假延长与性别差距：来自在线求职平台的证据
34304.authors: Hanming Fang, Jiayin Hu, Miao Yu
34304.abstract: We investigate the unintended consequences of maternity leave extension on gender gaps in the labor market. Using millions of job applications on an online job platform and the staggered extension of maternity leave across Chinese provinces, we find that an average increase (22%) in the length of paid maternity leave led to a 3.7 percentage point decrease in positive callbacks to female applicants relative to their male counterparts. In response, female job seekers submitted 4.4 more job applications, shifted toward jobs with 5.4% lower wages, and experienced 0.9 weeks longer job search duration than male applicants. We also find that government subsidies that partially cover firms' wage costs of extended maternity leave help alleviate its adverse impact on gender disparities in hiring.
34304.zh_abstract: 我们研究了产假延长对劳动力市场中性别差距的意外后果。利用在线求职平台上数百万份求职申请以及中国各省份产假的分阶段延长，我们发现，带薪产假时长平均增加22%导致女性求职者相对于男性求职者的积极回电率下降了3.7个百分点。作为回应，女性求职者比男性求职者多提交了4.4份求职申请，转向了工资低5.4%的工作，并且求职持续时间比男性求职者长了0.9周。我们还发现，部分覆盖企业延长产假工资成本的政府补贴有助于缓解其对招聘中性别差异的不利影响。
34304.meta: Programs：CH, LS, PE；JEL：J16, J18, J23, J64, J71

34303.title: Price and Volume Divergence in China’s Real Estate Markets: The Role of Local Governments
34303.zh_title: 中国房地产市场的价量背离：地方政府的作用
34303.authors: Jeffery (Jinfan) Chang, Yuheng Wang, Wei Xiong
34303.abstract: During the Covid-19 pandemic (2020-2022), Chinese cities witnessed a paradox: residential land and new house prices surged while transaction volumes plummeted. We attribute this to local governments’ active price management through supply controls, land acquisitions by Local Government Financing Vehicles (LGFVs), and limits on new home sales permits. Cities more dependent on land sales and land-backed debt before the pandemic experienced greater price increases and price-volume divergence, with LGFVs buying more land at higher prices than other buyers. These interventions helped sustain fiscal financing but deepened developers’ financial distress, revealing unintended consequences of local governments’ fiscal strategies during downturns.
34303.zh_abstract: 在新冠疫情期间（2020-2022年），中国城市出现了一个悖论：住宅用地和新房价格飙升，而交易量却暴跌。我们将此归因于地方政府通过供应控制、地方政府融资平台购地以及限制新房销售许可等方式进行的积极价格管理。在疫情前更依赖土地出让和土地抵押债务的城市，经历了更大的价格上涨和价量背离，地方政府融资平台以高于其他买家的价格购买了更多土地。这些干预措施有助于维持财政融资，但加深了开发商的财务困境，揭示了地方政府在衰退期间财政策略的意外后果。

34302.title: Playing with Blocs: Quantifying Decoupling
34302.authors: Barthélémy Bonadio, Zhen Huo, Elliot Kang, Andrei A. Levchenko, Nitya Pandalai-Nayar, Hiroshi Toma, Petia Topalova
34302.abstract: We adopt a data-driven approach to measure trade fragmentation over the period 2015-2023. Countries are classified into three groups according to changes in their trade costs with the US and China: those shifting toward the US bloc, those shifting toward the China bloc, and those with no change in alignment. Roughly one-quarter of countries moved toward each bloc, while about half showed no realignment. We document that while cross-bloc trade costs rose, they were accompanied by falling within-bloc trade costs. We use a quantitative model to compute the real income effects of this reconfiguration of the global trade costs. The median country in the world, and the median country within each bloc, has 0.4-0.6% higher real income as a result of the observed decoupling, contrary to the widespread belief that fragmentation has been welfare-reducing. Finally, we find a modest amount of bloc misalignment: the median country moving to the US bloc would actually be better off moving to the China bloc, and vice versa. These results suggest that trade decoupling does not always follow trade-driven economic interests.
34302.zh_abstract: 我们采用数据驱动的方法来衡量2015-2023年期间的贸易碎片化程度。根据各国与美国和中国贸易成本的变化，将其分为三组：向美国集团靠拢的国家、向中国集团靠拢的国家以及结盟关系没有变化的国家。大约四分之一的国家向每个集团靠拢，而约一半的国家没有表现出重新结盟。我们记录到，虽然跨集团的贸易成本上升，但集团内部的贸易成本却在下降。我们使用一个量化模型来计算这种全球贸易成本重构的实际收入效应。由于观察到的脱钩，世界上的中位国家以及每个集团内部的中位国家的实际收入提高了0.4-0.6%，这与普遍认为碎片化降低了福利的观点相反。最后，我们发现了一定程度的集团错配：向美国集团靠拢的中位国家实际上如果转向中国集团会过得更好，反之亦然。这些结果表明，贸易脱钩并不总是遵循贸易驱动的经济利益。

34301.title: Equity Frictions and Firm Ownership
34301.zh_title: 股权摩擦与企业所有权
34301.abstract: In this paper, I document systematic heterogeneity in ownership and financing of firms across Eurozone countries. To rationalize these differences, I build a quantitative general equilibrium model of workers and entrepreneurs who choose debt and equity financing of their firms, subject to rich country-specific financial frictions. The novel data on firm ownership and financing, combined with the structure of the model, allows me to quantify the level of debt and equity frictions in each country. Quantitatively, I find much larger output effects from equity frictions: harmonizing them across countries would lead to nearly four times larger output effects compared to debt frictions, and removing them would increase aggregate output by 75\\% more. The larger impact on output is due not only to the estimated levels and dispersion of equity frictions, but also to the fact that equity provides greater risk sharing, which further incentivizes entrepreneurs to expand their firms. Through their effect on risk sharing, equity frictions also rationalize the observed negative relationship between equity financing and wealth inequality. Quantitatively, they are responsible for over 70\\% of the explained variation in top wealth shares across countries.
34301.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我记录了欧元区各国企业在所有权和融资方面的系统性异质性。为了解释这些差异，我构建了一个包含工人和企业家的量化一般均衡模型，这些企业家在面临丰富的国家特定金融摩擦的情况下，为其企业选择债务和股权融资。关于企业所有权和融资的新数据，结合模型结构，使我能够量化每个国家的债务和股权摩擦水平。在量化上，我发现股权摩擦对产出的影响要大得多：在各国间协调统一股权摩擦对产出的影响几乎是协调统一债务摩擦的四倍，而消除股权摩擦将使总产出额外增加75%。对产出的更大影响不仅源于股权摩擦的估计水平和离散程度，还源于股权提供了更大的风险分担，这进一步激励企业家扩张其企业。通过其对风险分担的影响，股权摩擦也解释了观察到的股权融资与财富不平等之间的负相关关系。在量化上，它们解释了各国顶层财富份额中超过70%的已解释变异。

34300.title: How Credible is Hong Kong's Currency Peg?
34300.zh_title: 香港联系汇率制度的可信度有多高？
34300.authors: Urban Jermann, Bin Wei, Vivian Yue
34300.abstract: This paper develops an asset-pricing model to evaluate the credibility of Hong Kong’s Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS). Allowing for imperfect peg credibility, we derive closed-form solutions for exchange rates and option prices under potential regime shifts. Using HKD option data, we estimate market-implied probabilities of peg survival and the fundamental value of the HKD. Our results show that credibility fluctuates with U.S. interest rate hikes, local liquidity conditions, and Chinese currency dynamics. Compared with more standard Black-Scholes-based models, our approach provides more realistic assessments of peg sustainability.
34300.zh_abstract: 本文开发了一个资产定价模型来评估香港联系汇率制度的可信度。考虑到盯住汇率制度并非完全可信，我们推导出在潜在制度转换下汇率和期权价格的闭式解。利用港元期权数据，我们估计了市场隐含的盯住汇率存续概率以及港元的基本价值。我们的结果表明，可信度随着美国利率上调、本地流动性状况以及人民币汇率动态而波动。与更基于标准布莱克-斯科尔斯模型的模型相比，我们的方法提供了对盯住汇率可持续性更现实的评估。

34338.title: The Past and Future of U.S. Structural Change: Compositional Accounting and Forecasting
34338.zh_title: 美国结构性变化的过去与未来：构成核算与预测
34338.authors: Andrew Foerster, Andreas Hornstein, Pierre-Daniel Sarte, Mark W. Watson
34338.abstract: We explore the evolving significance of different production sectors within the U.S. economy since World War II and provide methods for estimating and forecasting these shifts. Using a compositional accounting approach, we find that the well-documented transition from goods to services is primarily driven by two compositional changes: 1) the rise of Intellectual Property Products (IPP) as an input producer, replacing Durable Goods almost one-for-one in terms of input shares in virtually all sectors; and 2) a shift in consumer spending from Nondurable Goods to Services. A structural model replicating these shifts reveals that the rise of IPP at the expense of Durable Goods is largely explained by increases in the efficiency of IPP inputs used in production: input-biased technical change. Trend variations in sectoral total factor productivity, and their attendant effects on relative prices and income, are the main driver of evolving consumption patterns. Both reduced-form and structural forecasts project these trends to continue over the next two decades, albeit at lower rates, indicating a slower pace of structural change.
34338.zh_abstract: 我们探讨了自二战以来美国经济中不同生产部门不断演变的重要性，并提供了估计和预测这些变化的方法。使用构成核算方法，我们发现，从商品到服务的广为人知的转变主要由两个构成变化驱动：1）知识产权产品作为投入生产者的崛起，几乎在所有部门中一对一地取代了耐用品在投入份额中的位置；2）消费者支出从非耐用品转向服务。一个复制这些变化的结构模型显示，知识产权产品以牺牲耐用品为代价的崛起，很大程度上可以通过知识产权产品投入在生产中使用效率的提高来解释：即投入偏向型技术变革。部门全要素生产率的趋势变化，及其对相对价格和收入的伴随影响，是消费模式演变的主要驱动力。简化形式和结构预测都表明，这些趋势将在未来二十年内持续，尽管速度会放缓，这表明结构性变化的速度正在减慢。

34337.title: Intimate Partner Violence in Low- and Middle-Income Countries: Insights from Economic Research
34337.zh_title: 低收入和中等收入国家的亲密伴侣暴力：来自经济学研究的见解
34337.abstract: Intimate partner violence (IPV) is a pervasive global issue, with approximately one in three women experiencing IPV over their lifetime. IPV prevalence is higher in low- and middle-income countries (LMICs), and costs of IPV are also considerably larger as a percentage of GDP in LMICs. We present the economic theory behind IPV and highlight some important determinants such as poverty and societal norms. We then synthesize the causal evidence on the impact of a range of policies and interventions, highlighting approaches which have been effective in reducing IPV. We identify key insights from the existing literature and outline areas where further theoretical and empirical research is needed.
34337.zh_abstract: 亲密伴侣暴力是一个普遍的全球性问题，大约三分之一的女性一生中会经历亲密伴侣暴力。在低收入和中等收入国家，亲密伴侣暴力的发生率更高，其成本占国内生产总值的比例也显著更大。我们介绍了亲密伴侣暴力背后的经济理论，并强调了一些重要的决定因素，如贫困和社会规范。然后，我们综合了一系列政策和干预措施影响的因果证据，重点介绍了在减少亲密伴侣暴力方面行之有效的方法。我们从现有文献中识别出关键见解，并概述了需要进一步开展理论和实证研究的领域。

34336.title: Fractional Ownership and Copyright Licensing: Evidence from the Music Industry
34336.zh_title: 分权所有权与版权许可：来自音乐产业的证据
34336.abstract: Creative content is often the product of collaboration, which may lead to fractional ownership of intellectual property. We study the effect of fractional ownership on the licensing of copyrighted material and its reuse. To do so, we compile new data on the copyright ownership structure of songs and their licensing for use in movies. We document that fractional song ownership has increased substantially: the mean number of songwriters and publishers per song has tripled between 1958 and 2021. We show that, conditional on a rich set of controls, greater fractionalization is associated with lower likelihood of licensing. We leverage the Sony-led acquisition of EMI Music Publishing in 2012 to obtain within-song variation in ownership and find that consolidating ownership rights significantly increases licensing, beyond any standalone effects of the merger.
34336.zh_abstract: 创意内容通常是合作的产物，这可能导致知识产权的分权所有权。我们研究了分权所有权对版权材料许可及其再利用的影响。为此，我们编制了关于歌曲版权所有权结构及其在电影中使用许可的新数据。我们记录到，歌曲分权所有权大幅增加：每首歌曲的词曲作者和出版商的平均数量在1958年至2021年间增长了两倍。我们表明，在控制一系列丰富变量的条件下，更大的分权化与更低的许可可能性相关。我们利用2012年索尼主导收购百代音乐出版的事件来获取歌曲内部所有权变化，并发现整合所有权权利显著增加了许可，这超出了合并本身的任何独立效应。

34335.title: Housing Betas
34335.abstract: This paper documents new stylized facts about returns and cashflow growth rates on stocks and housing over decade-long holding periods. While cashflow growth rates on the two assets comove positively, their returns comove negatively until the Global Financial Crisis and positively thereafter. These facts present a puzzle for representative-agent models that imply positive return comovement for assets with similar cashflows. I consider a heterogeneous-agent model with segmented stock and housing markets connected through credit. News about the aggregate economy generates negative return comovement. Recent shifts such as wealthier homebuyers and institutional housing purchases reduce the importance of credit and segmentation.
34335.zh_abstract: 本文记录了关于股票和住房在十年持有期内的回报率和现金流增长率的新典型事实。虽然两种资产的现金流增长率呈正相关，但它们的回报率在全球金融危机前呈负相关，之后呈正相关。这些事实对代表性代理人模型构成了一个难题，因为该模型暗示具有相似现金流的资产应具有正回报相关性。我们考虑了一个异质性代理人模型，该模型通过信贷连接分割的股票和住房市场。关于总体经济的新闻会产生负回报相关性。最近的转变，如更富裕的购房者和机构购房，降低了信贷和市场分割的重要性。

34334.title: Child Maltreatment Investigations and Family Well-being
34334.zh_title: 儿童虐待调查与家庭福祉
34334.authors: Katherine Rittenhouse, David Simon, Lindsey Lacey
34334.abstract: Over one third of children in the U.S. are investigated by the child protection system (CPS) by age 18, but the effects of this interaction on families and children are largely unknown. Investigations aim to protect children from harm and direct services to families in need. However, they also bring the implicit threat of child removal, which can generate both stress and institutional distrust among affected families. Using a regression discontinuity design, we study the impacts of this interaction on child health. Children who are just above the threshold for being “defaulted” into an investigation see a reduction in injuries and an increase in preventative care in the two months following the referral. Effects are consistent across child gender, race and age. Finally, investigations increase the likelihood that a parent is jailed, suggesting that investigations also detect criminal activity within the home. An exploration of mechanisms suggests that it is the investigation, rather than home removal or parental criminal justice system involvement, which improves child health.
34334.zh_abstract: 在美国，超过三分之一的儿童在18岁前会接受儿童保护系统的调查，但这种互动对家庭和儿童的影响在很大程度上是未知的。调查旨在保护儿童免受伤害，并向有需要的家庭提供服务。然而，调查也带来了儿童被带离家庭的隐性威胁，这可能在受影响家庭中引发压力和制度不信任。我们使用断点回归设计来研究这种互动对儿童健康的影响。那些刚好高于“默认”进入调查阈值的儿童，在转介后的两个月内，受伤情况减少，预防性护理增加。这种效应在儿童性别、种族和年龄上是一致的。最后，调查增加了父母被监禁的可能性，这表明调查也能发现家庭内的犯罪活动。对机制的探索表明，是调查本身，而非家庭带离或父母刑事司法系统的介入，改善了儿童健康。

34333.title: Trade and Development in a Fracturing World
34333.zh_title: 分裂世界中的贸易与发展
34333.abstract: In a fracturing world, how can low- and middle-income countries (LMICs) continue to leverage trade for economic development? Drawing on recent research at this intersection, this review argues that countries should look inward toward domestic reforms in key factor markets. I review evidence on how trade in LMICs is shaped by frictions in labor, capital, material, land, and information markets, and highlight areas where the evidence base remains thin. I concluded with a discussion of vertical policies relevant for LMICs—particularly the role of services—and suggest areas where further research is needed to assess whether development can be service-led.
34333.zh_abstract: 在一个分裂的世界中，低收入和中等收入国家如何继续利用贸易促进经济发展？基于这一交叉领域的最新研究，本综述认为，各国应向内看，关注关键要素市场的国内改革。我回顾了关于低收入和中等收入国家中贸易如何受到劳动力、资本、材料、土地和信息市场摩擦影响的证据，并强调了证据基础仍然薄弱的领域。最后，我讨论了与低收入和中等收入国家相关的垂直政策——特别是服务业的作用——并建议需要进一步研究的领域，以评估发展是否能够由服务业引领。

34332.title: Trade War and the Dollar Anchor
34332.authors: Tarek Alexander Hassan, Thomas M. Mertens, Jingye Wang, Tony Zhang
34332.abstract: We develop a general-equilibrium model in which the safety of a country's currency and the choice of its exchange-rate regime arise endogenously. Calibrated to pre-2025 data, the model replicates the U.S. dollar’s safety premium, low Treasury yields, and its status as the world's anchor currency. Introducing a trade war that isolates U.S. goods markets from the world erodes the U.S. dollar's safety premium, raises U.S. interest rates, and lowers the world market value of U.S. firms. For sufficiently high tariffs, small economies optimally re-peg to the euro, precipitating a phase shift to a euro-centric international monetary system and a global welfare loss. The analysis implies that persistent trade wars may threaten the financial privileges the United States derives from the dollar’s international role.
34332.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个一般均衡模型，在该模型中，一国货币的安全性和其汇率制度的选择是内生的。该模型以2025年前的数据进行校准，复制了美元的安全溢价、低国债收益率以及其作为世界锚定货币的地位。引入一场将美国商品市场与世界隔离的贸易战，会侵蚀美元的安全溢价，提高美国利率，并降低美国企业的全球市场价值。对于足够高的关税，小国最优地重新盯住欧元，从而引发向以欧元为中心的国际货币体系的阶段转变，并导致全球福利损失。该分析表明，持续的贸易战可能威胁到美国从美元国际角色中获得的金融特权。
34332.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM；JEL：E22, E4, F1, F3, G12

34331.title: Aggregating Average Treatment Effects on the Treated in Difference-in-Differences Models
34331.zh_title: 双重差分模型中处理组平均处理效应的加总
34331.authors: Partha Deb, Edward C. Norton, Jeffrey M. Wooldridge, Jeffrey E. Zabel
34331.abstract: For difference-in-differences methods, there has been great attention to obtaining consistent estimates of treatment effects, especially when the treatment effects are heterogeneous. However, there has been little discussion of the importance of weights in aggregating those treatment effects into an overall average treatment effect on the treated. There are many possible ways to aggregate estimated cohort-time treatment effects. We show that the standard software used to estimate Callaway and Sant’Anna’s method uses weights that are not just the number of treated observations in treated years. Instead, the software uses weights that include the number of observations in the reference pre-period instead of only the number of observations in the treated periods. We discuss why the aggregation weights matter and under what circumstances the weights make the most difference.
34331.zh_abstract: 对于双重差分方法，人们非常关注获得处理效应的一致估计，尤其是在处理效应存在异质性的情况下。然而，关于将这些处理效应加总为总体处理组平均处理效应时权重的重要性，讨论甚少。有许多可能的方法来加总估计的队列-时间处理效应。我们表明，用于估计Callaway和Sant'Anna方法的标准软件使用的权重不仅仅是处理年份中处理观测值的数量。相反，该软件使用的权重包括参考前期中的观测值数量，而不仅仅是处理期中的观测值数量。我们讨论了加总权重为何重要，以及在何种情况下权重的影响最大。

34330.title: Making AI Count: The Next Measurement Frontier
34330.zh_title: 让人工智能可衡量：下一个统计前沿
34330.authors: Diane Coyle, John Lourenze S. Poquiz
34330.abstract: Generative AI is transforming production, consumption, and work, yet current statistical frameworks would likely struggle to capture its economic full economic impact. While the 2025 System of National Accounts introduces AI as a distinct asset, challenges remain in valuing AI-related investments, inputs, and outputs. Moreover, as a general-purpose technology, AI alters business processes, service quality, and labor organization in ways poorly reflected in official data. This paper outlines key measurement gaps from transformative AI, including the tracking cross-border inputs, quality change, and process changes. We argue that economic statistics should adopt more granular, task-based, and outcome-focused approaches to ensure relevance in an increasingly AI-driven economy.
34330.zh_abstract: 生成式人工智能正在改变生产、消费和工作方式，但当前的统计框架可能难以捕捉其全部经济影响。虽然2025年国民账户体系将人工智能作为一种独特的资产引入，但在评估人工智能相关投资、投入和产出的价值方面仍然存在挑战。此外，作为一种通用目的技术，人工智能改变了业务流程、服务质量和劳动组织，而这些在官方数据中反映不足。本文概述了变革性人工智能带来的关键统计缺口，包括追踪跨境投入、质量变化和流程变化。我们认为，经济统计应采用更细化、基于任务和以结果为导向的方法，以确保在日益由人工智能驱动的经济中保持相关性。
34330.meta: Programs：IO, PR；JEL：C80, E01, E22, O3, O47

34329.title: Financial Value of Nature: Coastal Housing Markets, Mangroves, and Climate Resilience
34329.zh_title: 自然的金融价值：沿海住房市场、红树林与气候韧性
34329.authors: Teng Liu, Brook Constantz, Galina Hale, Michael Beck
34329.abstract: Measuring the financial value of nature is difficult, often resulting in insufficient funding directed to nature conservation and restoration. As coastal risks increase from development and climate change, a tangible benefit of nature is the protection it offers against storm damages. Many studies from the risk industry and others assess the direct effects of wetlands for reducing damage during storms. However, the value of wetlands for coastal protection could extend to many other benefits, including home prices in areas where storms are common. We use property-level housing transaction data from Zillow and show that proximity to mangroves in Florida moderates home price decline and dispersion following major hurricanes. The effects are substantial in magnitude, reducing the probability of losing a quarter or more of housing value by 2-7 percentage points, which corresponds to 20-40-thousand-dollar value for a million-dollar property, conditional on a hurricane.
34329.zh_abstract: 衡量自然的金融价值十分困难，这往往导致用于自然保护和恢复的资金不足。随着沿海地区因发展和气候变化而面临的风险增加，自然的一个切实益处是其对风暴损害的防护作用。风险行业及其他领域的许多研究评估了湿地在风暴期间减少损害的直接效应。然而，湿地对沿海保护的价値可能延伸至许多其他益处，包括在风暴频发地区的房价。我们利用Zillow的房产级住房交易数据，并表明在佛罗里达州，靠近红树林能够缓和重大飓风后房价的下跌和离散程度。这种效应在规模上相当显著，将损失四分之一或更多住房价值的概率降低了2到7个百分点，这对应于在飓风条件下，价值百万美元的房产价值损失减少2万至4万美元。

34328.title: “No One Can Borrow” – Reassessing the “Junior Can’t Borrow” Equity-Premium Puzzle Resolution
34328.zh_title: “无人能借贷”——重新评估“年轻人不能借贷”的股权溢价之谜解法
34328.abstract: “Junior Can’t Borrow,” Constantinides, Donaldson, and Mehra’s (CDM) three-period exchange model, eliminates borrowing by the young, and, consequently, all generations to resolve the equity premium puzzle. This paper examines CDM’s resolution in an 80-period, OLG model with capital, fiscal policy, macro shocks and steeply rising borrowing costs. Imposing such costs on all generations and, thereby, eliminating the bond market produces, as in CDM, a large premium. But permitting even one generation to sell bonds without transactions costs dramatically raises the safe rate, restoring the puzzle. Hence, “No One Can Borrow” not “Junior Can’t Borrow” is CDM’s real message. Since zero or low marginal-cost borrowing is commonplace – be it via secured borrowing or friends and family loans, CDM’s “solution” isn’t plausible. As in representative-agent RBCs, macro risk is low in OLG-RBCs – not because aggregate shocks are small, but because they can be hedged via self-insurance (saving) and largely average out over agents’ lifetimes. Indeed, absent high marginal borrowing costs, agents, even older ones, are close to indifferent between holding shares and holding bonds, rendering their net bond demand (supply) curves highly elastic. This explains why even a single generation is willing to supply significant amounts of bonds at a low price (high yield).
34328.zh_abstract: Constantinides、Donaldson和Mehra（CDM）的三期交换模型通过消除年轻人的借贷行为，进而消除所有世代的借贷，以解决股权溢价之谜。本文在一个包含资本、财政政策、宏观冲击和陡峭上升的借贷成本的80期世代交叠（OLG）模型中检验了CDM的解法。将此类成本强加于所有世代，从而消除债券市场，会产生如CDM模型中的高溢价。但是，即使允许一个世代在没有交易成本的情况下出售债券，也会显著提高无风险利率，从而恢复该谜题。因此，CDM的真正信息是“无人能借贷”，而非“年轻人不能借贷”。由于零或低边际成本的借贷——无论是通过有担保借贷还是亲友借贷——十分普遍，CDM的“解法”并不合理。如同在代表性代理人实际商业周期（RBC）模型中一样，OLG-RBC模型中的宏观风险较低——并非因为总体冲击较小，而是因为这些冲击可以通过自我保险（储蓄）进行对冲，并且在代理人的生命周期中很大程度上被平均化。实际上，在没有高边际借贷成本的情况下，代理人（即使是年长者）对持有股票和持有债券几乎无差异，这使得他们的净债券需求（供给）曲线高度富有弹性。这解释了为什么即使是一个世代也愿意以低价（高收益率）提供大量债券。

34327.title: How Immigration is Changing the Black-White Earnings Gap
34327.zh_title: 移民如何改变黑人与白人的收入差距
34327.authors: Rong Fu, Neeraj Kaushal, Felix Muchomba
34327.abstract: We provide new evidence on earnings gaps between non-Hispanic White and three generations of Black workers in the United States during 1995-2024, using nationally representative data. Results reveal remarkable earnings advances among 2nd-generation Black immigrants, opposite to the well-documented widening in overall Black-White earnings gap. Among women, 2nd-generation Black workers have earnings higher than or equal to White women; among men, they earn 10% less at the median, but the gap vanishes at the top decile. The gap for 1st-generation Black men is shrinking, halving at the top decile; for 1st-generation Black women it shows initial widening then shrinking at the median. The native Black-White gap remains stubbornly high. Educational attainment largely drives 2nd-generation success, while residential patterns play a protective role for the 1st and 2nd generations. These findings provide critical data to set the record straight on the accomplishments of the highly successful and rising demography of Black immigrants and their US-born children.
34327.zh_abstract: 我们利用具有全国代表性的数据，提供了1995年至2024年间美国非西班牙裔白人与三代黑人劳动者之间收入差距的新证据。结果显示，第二代黑人移民的收入取得了显著进步，这与整体黑人与白人收入差距的扩大趋势相反。在女性中，第二代黑人劳动者的收入高于或等于白人女性；在男性中，他们在中位数上收入低10%，但在收入最高十分位数上差距消失。第一代黑人男性的收入差距正在缩小，在最高十分位数上减半；第一代黑人女性的收入差距则呈现先扩大后在中位数上缩小的趋势。本土黑人与白人的收入差距仍然顽固地居高不下。教育程度在很大程度上推动了第二代移民的成功，而居住模式对第一代和第二代移民起到了保护作用。这些发现提供了关键数据，以准确记录高度成功且人口不断增长的非洲裔移民及其在美国出生的子女所取得的成就。
34327.meta: Programs：DAE, LS, PE；JEL：J0, J15, J3, J31

34326.title: Policy Options to Achieve US Sustainable Aviation Fuel Targets
34326.zh_title: 实现美国可持续航空燃料目标的政策选择
34326.authors: Mengying Wu, Kristen McCormack, William A. Scott, Aaron Smith, Jingran Zhang, James H. Stock
34326.abstract: Decarbonizing aviation in the short term will likely entail replacing large quantities of petroleum jet fuel with sustainable aviation fuels (SAFs), which are predominantly biofuels. In the United States, biofuels are currently used as substitutes for gasoline and diesel in road transportation and are supported by a complex set of federal and state policies including the Renewable Fuel Standard (RFS), state low carbon fuel standards, and state and federal tax credits. Policies promoting SAF therefore interact with surface transport biofuel policies. In this paper, we use a new detailed partial equilibrium model of road and air transportation fuel markets to compare various policy options designed to achieve a target of 3 billion gallons of SAF by 2030. Our results suggest that the target is attainable with current technology but not with current policy. Several potential federal policies, including modifications to the existing RFS, a federal SAF tax credit, or a clean aviation standard could meet the 3 billion gallon target with similar emissions reductions and costs but different incidence. The lowest cost policy we study entails replacing all current biofuels policies with a modest carbon tax on fossil transportation fuels paired with a SAF tax credit.
34326.zh_abstract: 短期内航空业的脱碳很可能需要大量用可持续航空燃料（SAF）替代石油基航空燃料，而SAF主要是生物燃料。在美国，生物燃料目前被用作道路运输中汽油和柴油的替代品，并受到包括可再生燃料标准（RFS）、州级低碳燃料标准以及州和联邦税收抵免在内的一套复杂政策的支持。因此，促进SAF的政策与地面运输生物燃料政策相互影响。在本文中，我们使用一个全新的、详细的公路和航空运输燃料市场局部均衡模型，来比较旨在到2030年实现30亿加仑SAF目标的各种政策选项。我们的结果表明，该目标在现有技术下是可以实现的，但在现有政策下则无法实现。几项潜在的联邦政策，包括对现有RFS的修改、联邦SAF税收抵免或清洁航空标准，都可以在实现类似的减排效果和成本的情况下达到30亿加仑的目标，但影响分布不同。我们研究的最低成本政策是，用对化石运输燃料征收适度碳税并辅以SAF税收抵免的方式，取代所有现有的生物燃料政策。

34325.title: FCI-plot: Central Bank Communication Through Financial Conditions
34325.zh_title: FCI图：通过金融状况进行央行沟通
34325.abstract: We develop a model of central bank communication where market participants' uncertainty about desired financial conditions creates misunderstandings ("tantrums") and amplifies the impact of financial noise on asset prices and economic activity. We show that directly communicating the expected financial conditions path (FCI-plot) eliminates tantrums and recruits arbitrageurs to insulate conditions from noise, while communicating expected interest rates alone fails to achieve these benefits. We demonstrate that scenario-based FCI-plot communication enhances recruitment when participants disagree with the central bank regarding scenario probabilities. This enables an "agree-to-disagree" equilibrium where markets help implement central bank objectives despite differing views.
34325.zh_abstract: 我们构建了一个央行沟通模型，其中市场参与者对理想金融状况的不确定性会引发误解（“市场动荡”），并放大金融噪音对资产价格和经济活动的影响。我们表明，直接沟通预期的金融状况路径（FCI图）可以消除市场动荡，并招募套利者来隔离金融状况免受噪音影响，而仅沟通预期利率则无法实现这些益处。我们证明，当参与者与央行在情景概率上存在分歧时，基于情景的FCI图沟通能够增强招募效果。这使得一种“求同存异”的均衡成为可能，在这种均衡中，尽管存在不同观点，市场仍有助于实现央行的目标。
34325.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E12, E32, E44, E52, E58, G10

34324.title: Racial Differences in Nursing Home Value Added
34324.zh_title: 养老院增值中的种族差异
34324.authors: Liran Einav, Amy Finkelstein, Neale Mahoney, James C. Okun
34324.abstract: We use detailed data on the evolution of health for about 0.8 million Black and 5.4 million white nursing home patients covered by Medicare between 2011 and 2019 to estimate race-specific value-added measures for more than 8,000 nursing homes in the United States. We estimate that the average nursing home value-added experienced by Black patients is about 30% lower than that received by white patients. Most of this gap reflects differences in value-added experienced by similar Black and white patients within the same nursing home, rather than differences in value-added across the nursing homes they go to.
34324.zh_abstract: 我们利用2011年至2019年间约80万黑人患者和540万白人患者（均为医疗保险覆盖的养老院居民）健康状况演变的详细数据，估算了美国8000多家养老院的种族特异性增值指标。我们估计，黑人患者所经历的平均养老院增值比白人患者低约30%。这一差距的大部分反映了在同一家养老院内，相似的黑人和白人患者所经历的增值差异，而非他们入住的不同养老院之间的增值差异。
34324.meta: Programs：AG, EH, IO, LS；JEL：H44, I1, I14, L0

34323.title: Bond-Stock Comovements
34323.zh_title: 债券与股票的同向波动
34323.authors: John Y. Campbell, Carolin Pflueger, Luis M. Viceira
34323.abstract: This paper documents that during the late 20th Century, nominal government bonds and stocks tended to comove positively, whereas during the first quarter of the 21st Century they have tended to comove negatively. A similar sign switch is observable for real government bonds and breakeven inflation rates. Recent macroeconomic events have caused short-lived changes in these comovements, and periods with high risk premia tend to be periods in which bond-stock comovements are large in absolute value. The paper surveys theoretical models of these phenomena.
34323.zh_abstract: 本文记录了在20世纪末，名义政府债券与股票倾向于同向波动，而在21世纪的前二十五年，它们则倾向于反向波动。实际政府债券和盈亏平衡通胀率也观察到了类似的符号转换。近期的宏观经济事件导致了这些同向波动的短期变化，而风险溢价较高的时期往往是债券与股票同向波动绝对值较大的时期。本文对这些现象的理论模型进行了综述。

34322.title: The Impact of a Genetic Predisposition to a Higher BMI on Education Outcomes
34322.zh_title: 较高BMI的遗传倾向对教育成果的影响
34322.authors: Jane Greve, Mette T. Jensen, Esben Agerbo, John Cawley
34322.abstract: This paper contributes to the literature on the impact of early-life health on education by estimating the effect of genetic predisposition to a higher body mass index (BMI) on educational attainment and related outcomes. The identification strategy exploits the randomness in which genes one inherits from one's parents by estimating sibling fixed effects models of the polygenic score for a higher BMI. These models are estimated using rich administrative data from Denmark for over 14,000 full siblings. We find that a one-standard-deviation increase in the genetic predisposition to a higher BMI is associated with a 1.4 percentage point (4.4%) lower probability of earning a high school diploma, a 1.7 percentage point (12.3%) lower probability of a college degree, and a 1.7 percentage point (3.7%) higher probability of vocational training. An investigation into mechanisms suggests that youth with a greater genetic predisposition to a higher BMI are more likely to report being bullied, have greater school absences, and lower test scores.
34322.zh_abstract: 本文通过估计较高身体质量指数（BMI）的遗传倾向对教育成就及相关结果的影响，为早期健康对教育影响的文献做出了贡献。识别策略利用了从父母那里继承哪些基因的随机性，通过估计较高BMI多基因评分的兄弟姐妹固定效应模型。这些模型利用丹麦超过14,000名全同胞的丰富行政数据进行估计。我们发现，较高BMI的遗传倾向每增加一个标准差，获得高中文凭的概率降低1.4个百分点（4.4%），获得大学学位的概率降低1.7个百分点（12.3%），而接受职业培训的概率则提高1.7个百分点（3.7%）。对机制的研究表明，具有较高BMI遗传倾向的青少年更有可能报告遭受欺凌、有更多的缺课次数以及更低的考试成绩。
34322.meta: Programs：CH, ED, EH；JEL：I1, I14, I2, I23, I24, J13

34321.title: Not Flourishing
34321.abstract: We examine evidence on the well-being and ill-being of the young for 22 countries in the Global Flourishing Study (GFS) 2022-2024 with the commonly used 12-component “flourishing” index and a new 4-component “not flourishing” index. Although flourishing is U-shaped in age in the pooled data it rises in age in 13 countries and declines in 7. By contrast, not-flourishing declines in age overall, and in each of its four components, and it declines in age in 15 of the 22 countries. We explore sensitivity of results to survey mode in countries using both computer-assisted telephone interviews (CATI) and computer-assisted web-based interviews (CAWI). When CATI is used, the young are happier than other age groups, but the opposite is the case when data are collected via CAWI. We validate the findings with analyses from two other data sets. First, we construct flourishing and not flourishing indices using different variables for the four European countries in the GFS - Germany, Spain, Sweden and UK - from the interviewer based European Social Survey (ESS) of 2023-2024. As with the GFS, the not-flourishing data shows ill-being declines in age while the flourishing data is more mixed. Second, we examine the internet-based Global Minds (GM) surveys, 2020-2025, on the same group of countries, and find well-being rises in age for all in both flourishing and not-flourishing variables. We argue that trends in youth suicide, self-harm and mental health hospitalizations are consistent with the age patterns in the not-flourishing index and with the internet-based survey evidence from both the flourishing and not-flourishing indexes.
34321.zh_abstract: 我们利用全球繁荣研究（GFS）2022-2024年22个国家的数据，通过常用的12项“繁荣”指数和一个新的4项“不繁荣”指数，考察了年轻人的福祉与不良状况。尽管在合并数据中，繁荣程度随年龄呈U型分布，但在13个国家中随年龄上升，在7个国家中随年龄下降。相比之下，不繁荣程度总体上随年龄下降，其四个组成部分也各自随年龄下降，并且在22个国家中的15个国家中随年龄下降。我们探讨了结果对调查模式的敏感性，这些国家同时使用计算机辅助电话访谈（CATI）和计算机辅助网络访谈（CAWI）。当使用CATI时，年轻人比其他年龄组更幸福，但当通过CAWI收集数据时，情况则相反。我们利用另外两个数据集的分析验证了这些发现。首先，我们利用2023-2024年基于访谈的欧洲社会调查（ESS）数据，为GFS中的四个欧洲国家（德国、西班牙、瑞典和英国）构建了繁荣和不繁荣指数，使用了不同的变量。与GFS一样，不繁荣数据显示不良状况随年龄下降，而繁荣数据则更为混杂。其次，我们考察了2020-2025年基于互联网的全球心智（GM）调查，针对同一组国家，发现无论是繁荣还是不繁荣变量，福祉都随年龄上升。我们认为，青年自杀、自残和心理健康住院的趋势与不繁荣指数的年龄模式以及基于互联网调查的繁荣和不繁荣指数证据是一致的。

34320.title: Climate Change, Conflict, and the Risk of Economic Collapse in Africa
34320.zh_title: 气候变化、冲突与非洲经济崩溃的风险
34320.authors: Joel Ferguson, Marshall Burke, Edward Miguel, Solomon M. Hsiang
34320.abstract: Is human-caused climate change likely to trigger enduring economic decline in modern societies? We study whether changes in violent conflict and economic growth caused by warming could interact to degrade economic opportunities and trap African countries in poverty. We provide evidence of an emerging high-conflict and low-growth "poverty trap" equilibrium in Africa and describe theoretically how such an equilibrium could result from warming. We then combine historical data on temperature, growth, and conflict with projections from a large ensemble of global climate models to evaluate the risk that warming and subsequent conflict could push African economies into a regime of sustained negative economic growth. We find that the risk of such "economic collapse" is material in a moderate-to-high emissions scenario. We estimate that in Africa, a current "high" emissions trajectory (RCP 7.0) may increase the incidence of conflict 5.1 percentage points (95% CI 0.2-13.0) and increase the share of countries with net negative GDP growth this century by 12.2 percentage points (95% CI 2.0-27.5). We calculate that roughly 82% of this additional conflict risk and 14% of projected GDP losses are due to the interacting effects between these two outcomes, underscoring the importance of accounting for their indirect effects and feedbacks. Our findings suggest an unprecedented scale of emissions mitigation, economic policy innovation or institutional investment that would be required to contain the risk of catastrophic human impacts from climate change in many African countries.
34320.zh_abstract: 人为气候变化是否可能引发现代社会的持续经济衰退？我们研究了由变暖导致的暴力冲突和经济增长变化是否可能相互作用，从而削弱经济机会并使非洲国家陷入贫困陷阱。我们提供了非洲出现高冲突、低增长的“贫困陷阱”均衡的证据，并从理论上描述了这种均衡如何由变暖导致。然后，我们将温度、增长和冲突的历史数据与大量全球气候模型的预测相结合，评估变暖及随后的冲突可能将非洲经济体推入持续负经济增长状态的风险。我们发现，在中高排放情景下，这种“经济崩溃”的风险是实质性的。我们估计，在非洲，当前“高”排放轨迹（RCP 7.0）可能使冲突发生率增加5.1个百分点（95%置信区间：0.2-13.0），并使本世纪GDP净负增长的国家比例增加12.2个百分点（95%置信区间：2.0-27.5）。我们计算出，大约82%的额外冲突风险和14%的预计GDP损失是由于这两个结果之间的相互作用效应，这凸显了考虑其间接效应和反馈的重要性。我们的研究结果表明，需要前所未有的减排规模、经济政策创新或制度投资，才能控制许多非洲国家气候变化带来的灾难性人类影响风险。
34320.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EFG, IFM, PE, POL；JEL：E0, F0, I3, O1, O44, Q54

34319.title: Capital Reallocation and Private Firm Dynamics
34319.zh_title: 资本再配置与私营企业动态
34319.authors: Anmol Bhandari, Paolo Martellini, Ellen McGrattan
34319.abstract: We develop a theory of firm dynamics and capital reallocation in private firms and use it to study the taxation of business income, capital, and capital gains. Intangible assets—such as customer bases and trade names—are created using owners' time and are infrequently traded in bilateral meetings. We discipline the model with U.S. administrative data, which report purchase prices and counterparties in asset transfers, allowing us to calibrate the investment technology and output elasticity for otherwise unobservable intangible capital. The equilibrium features dispersion in marginal product of capital, transferable share of firm value, and return on business wealth. Introducing taxation, we find that capital gains taxes are most distortionary, primarily by discouraging entry and reallocation of capital, whereas income taxes are least distortionary.
34319.zh_abstract: 我们发展了一个关于私营企业动态和资本再配置的理论，并用它来研究对营业收入、资本和资本利得的税收。无形资产——如客户群和商号——是利用所有者的时间创造的，并且在双边会面中不经常交易。我们利用美国行政数据对模型进行校准，这些数据报告了资产转移中的购买价格和交易对手，使我们能够校准原本不可观察的无形资本的投资技术和产出弹性。均衡的特征是资本边际产品、企业价值可转让份额和商业财富回报率的分散。引入税收后，我们发现资本利得税最具扭曲性，主要通过抑制企业进入和资本再配置，而所得税的扭曲性最小。

34318.title: The Impact of AI and Digital Platforms on the Information Ecosystem
34318.zh_title: 人工智能与数字平台对信息生态系统的影响
34318.abstract: We develop a tractable model to study how AI and digital platforms impact the information ecosystem. News producers — who create truthful or untruthful content that becomes a public good or bad — earn revenue from consumer visits. Consumers search for information and differ in their ability to distinguish truthful from untruthful information. AI and digital platforms influence the ecosystem by: improving the efficiency of processing and transmission of information, endangering the producer business model, changing the relative cost of producing misinformation and altering the ability of consumers to screen quality. We find that in the absence of adequate regulation (accountability, content moderation, and intellectual property protection) the quality of the information ecosystem may decline, both because the equilibrium quantity of truthful information declines and the share of misinformation increases; and polarization may intensify. While some of these problems are already evident with digital platforms, AI may have different, and overall more adverse, impacts.
34318.zh_abstract: 我们开发了一个易于处理的模型，研究人工智能和数字平台如何影响信息生态系统。新闻生产者——创造真实或不真实的内容，这些内容成为公共物品或公害——通过消费者访问获得收入。消费者搜索信息，并且他们在区分真实与不真实信息的能力上存在差异。人工智能和数字平台通过以下方式影响生态系统：提高信息处理和传输的效率，危及生产者商业模式，改变生产错误信息的相对成本，以及改变消费者筛选质量的能力。我们发现，在缺乏适当监管（问责制、内容审核和知识产权保护）的情况下，信息生态系统的质量可能会下降，这既是因为真实信息的均衡数量下降，也是因为错误信息的份额增加；同时，极化可能会加剧。虽然其中一些问题在数字平台上已经显而易见，但人工智能可能产生不同且总体上更不利的影响。

34317.title: The Impact of Immunotherapy on Reductions in Cancer Mortality: Evidence from Medicare
34317.zh_title: 免疫疗法对癌症死亡率降低的影响：来自医疗保险的证据
34317.authors: Danea Horn, Abby E. Alpert, Mark Duggan, Mireille Jacobson
34317.abstract: Immunotherapy is a breakthrough innovation in cancer care but is also among the most expensive treatments, with costs exceeding $\$150,000$ per patient. We study the introduction of immune checkpoint inhibitors (ICIs), the most widely used class of immunotherapy drugs. In 2022, ICIs accounted for 44% of the $\$17.5$ billion Medicare Part B cancer drug spending. We focus on metastatic melanoma, the first approved indication for ICIs. While overall cancer mortality rates declined since the 1990s, melanoma mortality rates increased through the early 2010s. Following the first ICI approvals in 2011 and 2014, melanoma mortality declined sharply. Using traditional Medicare claims, we estimate the impact of the introduction of ICIs on healthcare utilization, costs, and 1-year survival for patients with metastatic melanoma, relative to metastatic colorectal cancer (CRC), where ICIs were not approved until 2017. Variation in approval timing allows us to isolate the effect of ICIs from broader cancer care trends. We find that ICIs reduced 1-year mortality by 6.2%. Since about 1 in 5 metastatic melanoma patients received ICIs, this implies a 27.5% reduction among treated patients. The introduction of ICIs also reduced chemotherapy and radiation use, but increased Medicare spending by 59.3% or about 260% among ICI-treated patients. Accounting for life expectancy gains beyond one year, the benefits of ICIs for melanoma patients appear comparable, or potentially even greater, than the substantial added Medicare costs. Nonetheless, ICI use remains relatively low given large survival benefits and few alternative treatments, suggesting that costs and other barriers limit patient access.
34317.zh_abstract: 免疫疗法是癌症治疗中的一项突破性创新，但也是最昂贵的治疗方法之一，每位患者的费用超过15万美元。我们研究了免疫检查点抑制剂（ICIs）的引入，这是最广泛使用的一类免疫治疗药物。2022年，ICIs占175亿美元医疗保险B部分癌症药物支出的44%。我们重点关注转移性黑色素瘤，这是ICIs首个获批的适应症。尽管自1990年代以来总体癌症死亡率有所下降，但黑色素瘤死亡率在2010年代初期之前一直上升。在2011年和2014年首次批准ICIs后，黑色素瘤死亡率急剧下降。利用传统医疗保险索赔数据，我们估计了ICIs引入对转移性黑色素瘤患者医疗利用、成本和一年生存率的影响，并与转移性结直肠癌（CRC）患者进行比较，后者直到2017年才获批ICIs。批准时间的差异使我们能够将ICIs的影响与更广泛的癌症治疗趋势区分开来。我们发现，ICIs使一年死亡率降低了6.2%。由于大约五分之一的转移性黑色素瘤患者接受了ICIs治疗，这意味着接受治疗的患者死亡率降低了27.5%。ICIs的引入也减少了化疗和放疗的使用，但使医疗保险支出增加了59.3%，在接受ICIs治疗的患者中增加了约260%。考虑到一年以上的预期寿命增长，ICIs对黑色素瘤患者的益处似乎与大幅增加的医疗保险成本相当，甚至可能更大。尽管如此，鉴于巨大的生存获益和极少的替代治疗方案，ICIs的使用率仍然相对较低，这表明成本和其他障碍限制了患者的可及性。
34317.meta: Programs：AG, EH, PE, PR；JEL：H51, I13, I18, O38

34316.title: Genius on Demand: The Value of Transformative Artificial Intelligence
34316.zh_title: 按需天才：变革性人工智能的价值
34316.authors: Ajay K. Agrawal, Joshua S. Gans, Avi Goldfarb
34316.abstract: This paper examines how the emergence of transformative AI systems providing ``genius on demand" would affect knowledge worker allocation and labour market outcomes. We develop a simple model distinguishing between routine knowledge workers, who can only apply existing knowledge with some uncertainty, and genius workers, who create new knowledge at a cost increasing with distance from a known point. When genius capacity is scarce, we find it should be allocated primarily to questions at domain boundaries rather than at midpoints between known answers. The introduction of AI geniuses fundamentally transforms this allocation. In the short run, human geniuses specialise in questions that are furthest from existing knowledge, where their comparative advantage over AI is greatest. In the long run, routine workers may be completely displaced if AI efficiency approaches human genius efficiency.
34316.zh_abstract: 本文研究了提供“按需天才”的变革性人工智能系统的出现将如何影响知识工作者的配置和劳动力市场结果。我们开发了一个简单模型，区分了常规知识工作者（只能以一定不确定性应用现有知识）和天才工作者（以与已知点距离增加的成本创造新知识）。当天才能力稀缺时，我们发现它应主要分配给领域边界上的问题，而不是已知答案之间的中点问题。人工智能天才的引入从根本上改变了这种配置。在短期内，人类天才专门研究离现有知识最远的问题，在那里他们相对于人工智能的比较优势最大。在长期内，如果人工智能效率接近人类天才效率，常规工作者可能被完全取代。

34315.title: What Can Satellite Imagery and Machine Learning Measure?
34315.zh_title: 卫星图像和机器学习能测量什么？
34315.authors: Jonathan Proctor, Tamma Carleton, Trinetta Chong, Taryn Fransen, Simon Greenhill, Jessica Katz, Hikari Murayama, Luke Sherman, Jeanette Tseng, Hannah Druckenmiller, Solomon Hsiang
34315.abstract: Satellite imagery and machine learning (SIML) are increasingly being combined to remotely measure social and environmental outcomes, yet use of this technology has been limited by insufficient understanding of its strengths and weaknesses. Here, we undertake the most extensive effort yet to characterize the potential and limits of using a SIML technology to measure ground conditions. We conduct 115 standardized large-scale experiments using a composite high-resolution optical image of Earth and a generalizable SIML technology to evaluate what can be accurately measured and where this technology struggles. We find that SIML alone predicts roughly half the variation in ground measurements on average, and that variables describing human society (e.g. female literacy, R²=0.55) are generally as easily measured as natural variables (e.g. bird diversity, R²=0.55). Patterns of performance across measured variable type, space, income and population density indicate that SIML can likely support many new applications and decision-making use cases, although within quantifiable limits.
34315.zh_abstract: 卫星图像和机器学习（SIML）越来越多地被结合起来远程测量社会和环境结果，然而，由于对其优势和局限性了解不足，这项技术的使用受到限制。在此，我们进行了迄今为止最广泛的努力，以描述使用SIML技术测量地面状况的潜力和限制。我们利用地球的复合高分辨率光学图像和一种可推广的SIML技术，进行了115项标准化的大规模实验，以评估哪些可以准确测量以及该技术在哪些方面存在困难。我们发现，仅SIML平均能预测地面测量值大约一半的变异，并且描述人类社会的变量（例如女性识字率，R²=0.55）通常与自然变量（例如鸟类多样性，R²=0.55）一样容易测量。跨测量变量类型、空间、收入和人口密度的表现模式表明，SIML很可能支持许多新的应用和决策用例，尽管在可量化的限制范围内。
34315.meta: Programs：DEV, EEE, EH, LS, PE；JEL：C80, Q5

34314.title: Incorporating Non-Unitary Income Elasticities, Choke Prices and Choke Incomes into Applied General-Equilibrium Models
34314.zh_title: 将非单位收入弹性、窒息价格和窒息收入纳入应用一般均衡模型
34314.abstract: Traditional applied general-equilibrium (AGE) models have always faced trade-offs between analytical and computational tractability and counter-empirical restrictions. One is the assumption of homothetic preferences implying unitary income elasticities of demand, significantly inconsistent with data. Similarly, there is no “choke” income level, below which a certain good is not purchased and there is no choke price above which a good is not purchased, implying no changes in the extensive margin of trade. Here I exploit what I will label a Stone-Geary Modified (SGM) formulation. This produces a model in which there are non-unitary income elasticities, choke income levels for some/all goods, and choke prices. The second approach modifies CRIE (constant relative income elasticity) preferences which are preferred for modeling income elasticities, but don’t by themselves permit choke income and prices. While other authors have explored these properties in alternative ways, both my approaches have considerable advantages for high-dimension simulation models in that they retain CES structures and functional forms so that they can slot right into existing modeling formats. They require only small modifications to off-the-shelf cost and expenditure functions, and therefore goods and factor demand functions via Shepard’s lemma. Unobserved parameters can be calibrated from observed data and econometric estimates.
34314.zh_abstract: 传统的应用一般均衡（AGE）模型一直在分析性和计算易处理性与反经验限制之间面临权衡。其中之一是同质偏好的假设，意味着需求的单位收入弹性，这与数据显著不一致。同样，不存在“窒息”收入水平（低于该水平不购买某种商品）和不存在窒息价格（高于该价格不购买某种商品），这意味着贸易的广延边际没有变化。在这里，我利用我将称之为Stone-Geary修正（SGM）的公式。这产生了一个模型，其中存在非单位收入弹性、某些/所有商品的窒息收入水平和窒息价格。第二种方法修改了CRIE（恒定相对收入弹性）偏好，这种偏好更适合于对收入弹性建模，但本身不允许窒息收入和价格。虽然其他作者以其他方式探索了这些性质，但我的两种方法对于高维模拟模型都具有相当大的优势，因为它们保留了CES结构和函数形式，从而可以直接嵌入现有的建模格式。它们只需要对现成的成本和支出函数进行微小修改，进而通过谢泼德引理修改商品和要素需求函数。未观察到的参数可以从观测数据和计量经济学估计中校准。

34313.title: Understanding and Addressing Temperature Impacts on Mortality
34313.zh_title: 理解并应对温度对死亡率的影响
34313.authors: Marshall Burke, Andrew J. Wilson, Tumenkhusel Avirmed, Jonas Wallstein, Mariana C. M. Martins, Patrick Behrer, Christopher W. Callahan, Marissa Childs, June Choi, Karina French, Carlos F. Gould, Sam Heft-Neal, Renzhi Jing, Minghao Qiu, Lisa Rennels, Emma Krasovich Southworth
34313.abstract: A large literature documents how ambient temperature affects human mortality. Using decades of detailed data from 30 countries, we revisit and synthesize key findings from this literature. We confirm that ambient temperature is among the largest external threats to human health, and is responsible for a remarkable 5-12% of total deaths across countries in our sample, or hundreds of thousands of deaths per year in both the U.S. and EU. In all contexts we consider, cold kills more than heat, though the temperature of minimum risk rises with age, making younger individuals more vulnerable to heat and older individuals more vulnerable to cold. We find evidence for adaptation to the local climate, with hotter places experiencing somewhat lower risk at higher temperatures, but still more overall mortality from heat due to more frequent exposure. Within countries, higher income is not associated with uniformly lower vulnerability to ambient temperature, and the overall burden of mortality from ambient temperature is not falling over time. Finally, we systematically summarize the limited set of studies that rigorously evaluate interventions that can reduce the impact of heat and cold on health. We find that many proposed and implemented policy interventions lack empirical support and do not target temperature exposures that generate the highest health burden, and that some of the most beneficial interventions for reducing the health impacts of cold or heat have little explicit to do with climate.
34313.zh_abstract: 大量文献记录了环境温度如何影响人类死亡率。利用来自30个国家数十年的详细数据，我们重新审视并综合了该文献的关键发现。我们证实，环境温度是人类健康面临的最大外部威胁之一，在我们的样本国家中，它导致了惊人的5%至12%的总死亡人数，相当于美国和欧盟每年数十万人的死亡。在我们考虑的所有情境中，寒冷导致的死亡人数多于炎热，尽管最低风险温度随年龄增长而上升，这使得年轻人更容易受到炎热的影响，而老年人更容易受到寒冷的影响。我们发现了适应本地气候的证据，即较热地区在高温下的风险略低，但由于更频繁的高温暴露，总体死亡率仍然更高。在国家内部，较高的收入并不与对环境温度的普遍较低脆弱性相关联，并且环境温度造成的总体死亡负担并未随时间下降。最后，我们系统地总结了那些严格评估可减少热和冷对健康影响的干预措施的有限研究。我们发现，许多提议和实施的政策干预措施缺乏实证支持，并未针对造成最高健康负担的温度暴露，并且一些对减少寒冷或炎热健康影响最有益的干预措施与气候几乎没有直接关系。

34312.title: Artificial Intelligence in Research and Development
34312.abstract: How much can AI accelerate progress in different research fields? This paper shows that three features—the share of research tasks AI performs, the productivity of AI at those tasks, and the strength of bottlenecks—are key determinants of AI’s implications in any area, from cancer therapeutics to software design. The model maps changes in AI capabilities to research outcomes, quantifies the “marginal returns to intelligence,” and shows how AI can shift returns to R&D investment. Concepts like superintelligence, Powerful AI, and Transformative AI are further engaged and disciplined. Finally, the framework sets a measurement agenda linking AI benchmarks to field-specific opportunities for accelerating progress.
34312.zh_abstract: 人工智能能在多大程度上加速不同研究领域的进展？本文表明，三个特征——人工智能在研究任务中所占的份额、人工智能在这些任务上的生产力以及瓶颈的强度——是决定人工智能在任何领域（从癌症治疗到软件设计）影响的关键因素。该模型将人工智能能力的变化映射到研究成果上，量化了“智能的边际回报”，并展示了人工智能如何改变研发投资的回报。超级智能、强大人工智能和变革性人工智能等概念得到了进一步的探讨和约束。最后，该框架设定了一个衡量议程，将人工智能基准与特定领域加速进展的机会联系起来。

34311.title: What Does It Take? Quantifying Cross-Country Transfers in the Eurozone
34311.zh_title: 需要什么？量化欧元区的跨国转移支付
34311.authors: Yi-Li Chien, Zhengyang Jiang, Matteo Leombroni, Hanno Lustig
34311.abstract: We compute the cross-country transfers that result from unconventional monetary policy in the Eurozone. The ECB funds the expansion of its aggregate balance sheet mostly by issuing bank reserves and cash in core countries. The national central banks (NCBs) in periphery countries then borrow from the core NCBs at below-market rates to fund the asset purchases and bank lending. In addition, NCBs in the periphery lend more to their own banks at below-market rates. To compute the cross-country transfers, we compare the resulting cross-country distribution of NCB income to a counterfactual scenario without the ECB and without non-marketable intra-Eurozone debt. We document significant and persistent transfers from the core to the periphery.
34311.zh_abstract: 我们计算了欧元区非常规货币政策导致的跨国转移支付。欧洲央行主要通过发行核心国家的银行准备金和现金来为其总资产负债表的扩张提供资金。然后，外围国家的国家中央银行以低于市场的利率从核心国家的国家中央银行借款，为资产购买和银行贷款提供资金。此外，外围国家的国家中央银行以低于市场的利率向其本国银行提供更多贷款。为了计算跨国转移支付，我们将由此产生的国家中央银行收入跨国分配与一个没有欧洲央行且没有不可交易的欧元区内债务的反事实情景进行了比较。我们记录了从核心国家到外围国家的显著且持续的转移支付。
34311.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E42, E52, F33, G15

34310.title: Human Capital Accumulation Across Space
34310.zh_title: 跨空间的人力资本积累
34310.authors: Klaus Desmet, Dávid Krisztián Nagy, Esteban Rossi-Hansberg
34310.abstract: This paper studies how human capital shapes the economic geography of development. We develop a model in which the cost of acquiring human capital varies across space, and regions with higher human capital innovate more. Locations are spatially connected through migration and trade. There are localized agglomeration economies, and human-capital-augmenting technology diffuses across space. Using high-resolution data on income and schooling, we quantify and simulate the model at the 1° x 1° resolution for the entire globe. Over the span of two centuries, the model predicts strong persistence in the spatial distribution of development — unlike spatial dynamic models without human capital, which predict convergence. Proportionally lowering the cost of education in sub-Saharan Africa or Central and South Asia raises local outcomes but reduces global welfare, whereas the same policy in Latin America improves global outcomes. An alternative policy equalizing educational costs across sub-Saharan Africa generates relatively worse outcomes, as population reallocates within the region toward less productive areas. Central to these results is the estimated negative correlation between the education costs and local fundamentals, as well as inefficiencies in the spatial allocation due to externalities.
34310.zh_abstract: 本文研究人力资本如何塑造发展的经济地理。我们构建了一个模型，其中获取人力资本的成本因空间而异，而人力资本较高的地区创新更多。各地区通过移民和贸易在空间上相互连接。存在本地化的集聚经济，且人力资本增强型技术在空间上扩散。利用关于收入和教育的精细数据，我们在全球范围内以1°×1°的分辨率对模型进行了量化和模拟。在两个世纪的时间跨度内，该模型预测了发展空间分布的强持续性——这与没有人力资本的空间动态模型不同，后者预测趋同。按比例降低撒哈拉以南非洲或中亚和南亚的教育成本会提高当地产出，但会降低全球福利，而在拉丁美洲实施同样的政策则会改善全球产出。另一种在撒哈拉以南非洲地区均等化教育成本的政策产生了相对较差的产出，因为人口在该区域内重新分配到生产力较低的地区。这些结果的核心在于教育成本与当地基础条件之间估计出的负相关关系，以及由于外部性导致的空间配置无效率。
34310.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI, PE, PR；JEL：E24, F10, I24, J24, O11, O18, O33, R12, R23

34309.title: Group versus Individual Coaching for Rural Social Protection Programs: Evidence from Uganda, Philippines, and Bangladesh
34309.zh_title: 农村社会保护计划中的团体辅导与个人辅导：来自乌干达、菲律宾和孟加拉国的证据
34309.authors: Emily A. Beam, Lasse Brune, Narayan Das, Stefan Dercon, Nathanael Goldberg, Rozina Haque, Dean Karlan, Maliha Khan, Doug Parkerson, Ashley Pople, Yasuyuki Sawada, Christopher Udry, and Rocco Zizzamia
34309.abstract: Multifaceted social protection programs in low-income countries often include both capital grants and informational and behavioral support on the premise that households face simultaneous and multiple frictions. To tackle informational and behavioral constraints, programs typically deploy either individual or group coaching visits from field agents. The relative efficacy of individual versus group coaching could provide insights into the underlying mechanism through which information and behavioral support change household decisions. However, in three similar randomized evaluations in Uganda, the Philippines, and Bangladesh, we find no differences in efficacy. Given its 15–20% lower costs, group coaching is more cost-effective.
34309.zh_abstract: 低收入国家多方面的社会保护计划通常既包括资本赠款，也包括信息和行为支持，前提是家庭面临同时且多重的摩擦。为了解决信息和行为约束，这些计划通常由实地工作人员提供个人辅导或团体辅导访问。个人辅导与团体辅导的相对效果可以为信息和行为支持改变家庭决策的潜在机制提供见解。然而，在乌干达、菲律宾和孟加拉国三个类似的随机评估中，我们发现效果没有差异。鉴于其成本低15-20%，团体辅导更具成本效益。

34308.title: LLM Survey Framework: Coverage, Reasoning, Dynamics, Identification
34308.zh_title: LLM调查框架：覆盖范围、推理、动态、识别
34308.authors: Jing Cynthia Wu, Jin Xi, Shihan Xie
34308.abstract: We propose a new LLM-based survey framework that enables retrospective coverage, economic reasoning, dynamic effects, and clean identification. We recover human-comparable treatment effects in a multi-wave randomized controlled trial of inflation expectations surveys, at 1/1000 the cost. To demonstrate the framework’s full potential, we extend the benchmark human survey (10 waves, 2018–2023) to over 50 waves dating back to 1990. We further examine the economic mechanisms underlying agents’ expectation formation, identifying the mean-reversion and individual-attention channels. Finally, we trace dynamic treatment effects and demonstrate clean identification. Together, these innovations demonstrate that LLM surveys enable research designs unattainable with human surveys.
34308.zh_abstract: 我们提出了一种新的基于LLM的调查框架，该框架能够实现回顾性覆盖、经济推理、动态效应和清晰识别。我们在一个关于通胀预期调查的多轮随机对照试验中，以千分之一的成本恢复了与人类可比的处理效应。为了展示该框架的全部潜力，我们将基准人类调查（10轮，2018-2023年）扩展到可追溯至1990年的50多轮。我们进一步考察了主体预期形成的经济机制，识别出均值回归和个体注意力渠道。最后，我们追踪了动态处理效应并展示了清晰的识别。这些创新共同表明，LLM调查能够实现人类调查无法达到的研究设计。

34307.title: Bond Convenience Yields in the Eurozone Currency Union
34307.zh_title: 欧元区货币联盟中的债券便利收益率
34307.authors: Zhengyang Jiang, Hanno Lustig, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh, Mindy Z. Xiaolan
34307.abstract: In a monetary union, the risk-free rate cannot adjust to country-level fiscal positions, leaving only default spreads and convenience yields to respond. Empirically, we find that convenience yields explain a large share of the variation in Eurozone sovereign bond yields. Eurozone sovereign bonds earn larger convenience yields when their governments run larger surpluses. Since convenience yields generate substantial seigniorage revenue from debt issuance, our estimates imply economically large fiscal costs from low convenience yields for peripheral countries in the Eurozone.
34307.zh_abstract: 在货币联盟中，无风险利率无法根据国家层面的财政状况进行调整，只有违约利差和便利收益率可以做出反应。实证发现，便利收益率解释了欧元区主权债券收益率变动的很大一部分。当欧元区主权国家政府拥有更大的盈余时，其主权债券能获得更大的便利收益率。由于便利收益率从债务发行中产生了大量的铸币税收入，我们的估计意味着，对于欧元区外围国家而言，低便利收益率带来了经济上巨大的财政成本。
34307.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, IFM, ME；JEL：E42, F33, G15

34306.title: Private Equity, Consumers, and Competition: Evidence from the Nursing Home Industry
34306.zh_title: 私募股权、消费者与竞争：来自养老院行业的证据
34306.authors: Ashvin Gandhi, YoungJun Song, Prabhava Upadrashta
34306.abstract: This paper studies how product market competition shapes the impact of private equity (PE) acquisitions on consumers. We examine nursing home buyouts and observe that PE-owned facilities exhibit greater competitive sensitivity: competing more aggressively when competitive incentives are strong and exploiting market power more aggressively when competitive incentives are weak. We find that PE-owned facilities are more sensitive to local market competition—even when comparing effects only across facilities purchased as part of the same acquisition—and are more responsive to a pro-competitive policy helping consumers compare facilities. This suggests that regulators should attend to the competitive sensitivity of acquirers and the concentration of markets where acquisitions occur, as well as consider pro-competitive policies to mitigate or even reverse PE’s potentially adverse consequences.
34306.zh_abstract: 本文研究产品市场竞争如何塑造私募股权收购对消费者的影响。我们考察了养老院的收购案例，并观察到私募股权所有的设施表现出更强的竞争敏感性：当竞争激励强烈时，它们更积极地竞争；当竞争激励较弱时，它们更积极地利用市场势力。我们发现，私募股权所有的设施对本地市场竞争更为敏感——即使在比较作为同一收购一部分而购买的设施之间的效应时也是如此——并且对一项帮助消费者比较设施的支持竞争政策反应更积极。这表明，监管机构应关注收购方的竞争敏感性以及收购发生市场的集中度，同时考虑采取支持竞争的政策，以减轻甚至扭转私募股权可能带来的不利后果。
34306.meta: Programs：AG, CF, EH, IO, PR；JEL：G3, G32, G34, G38, I1, I11, I18, L1, L11, L15

34371.title: Banking Crises, Nonlinear Export Elasticities, and the Dominant Currency Paradigm
34371.zh_title: 银行业危机、非线性出口弹性与主导货币范式
34371.abstract: The dominant currency paradigm posits that dollar invoicing reduces the potency of exchange rate depreciations in boosting export volumes. This implies that export elasticities with respect to the exchange rate are small, rendering even large depreciations ineffectual in the short term. We incorporate two innovations versus existing work. First, we allow for nonlinearities, permitting large depreciations to disproportionately lift exports. Second, we control for banking crises, which accompany many depreciations. Our baseline export elasticity—without nonlinearities or banking crisis controls—is -0.3, consistent with prevailing “elasticity pessimism.” This elasticity rises to between -0.5 and -0.8 within two years for depreciations above 20 percent without banking crises.
34371.zh_abstract: 主导货币范式认为，美元计价降低了汇率贬值在提升出口量方面的效力。这意味着出口对汇率的弹性很小，使得即使大幅贬值在短期内也无效。我们相对于现有研究引入了两项创新。第一，我们允许非线性，使大幅贬值能够不成比例地提振出口。第二，我们控制了伴随许多贬值的银行业危机。我们的基准出口弹性——没有非线性或银行业危机控制——为-0.3，与流行的“弹性悲观主义”一致。对于没有银行业危机且贬值超过20%的情况，这一弹性在两年内升至-0.5至-0.8之间。

34366.title: Who Rides Out the Storm? The Immediate Post-College Transition and its Role in Socioeconomic Earnings Gaps
34366.zh_title: 谁挺过了风暴？大学毕业后立即转型及其在社会经济收入差距中的作用
34366.authors: Judith Scott-Clayton, Veronica Minaya, C.J. Libassi, Joshua K.R. Thomas
34366.abstract: Despite a large earnings premium for bachelor’s degree completion in general, graduates from low-income families earn substantially less than graduates from high-income families. While prior research has documented the role of college quality and major choice in explaining these gaps, we examine undermatching on a different margin: the first (post-college) job transition. The transition from college to the labor market can be challenging to navigate, and students with financial, informational, or other disadvantages during the job search may be more likely to “undermatch” to their first job. Using administrative data from a large, urban, public college system, we document large gaps in earnings five years after graduation by SES (proxied by financial aid receipt) that remain unexplained even after controlling for GPA, college, field of study, and other pre-graduation characteristics. We then examine how features of the initial job transition relate to longer-term earnings, and to what extent differences in the first job transition can explain later SES earnings gaps. Our results show that first job transitions are rocky for many graduates, strongly predict earnings at Year 5, and are a substantial mediator of socioeconomic gaps in earnings five years after college graduation—reducing the unexplained gap by almost two-thirds.
34366.zh_abstract: 尽管总体上获得学士学位有巨大的收入溢价，但来自低收入家庭的毕业生收入远低于来自高收入家庭的毕业生。虽然先前的研究记录了大学质量和专业选择在解释这些差距中的作用，但我们考察了另一个维度上的“低配”：首次（大学毕业后）工作转型。从大学到劳动力市场的转型可能难以驾驭，在求职过程中面临财务、信息或其他劣势的学生更可能“低配”到他们的第一份工作。利用一个大型城市公立大学系统的行政数据，我们记录了按社会经济地位（以助学金获得情况为代理）划分的毕业五年后收入巨大差距，即使在控制了GPA、大学、学习领域和其他毕业前特征后，这些差距仍然无法解释。然后，我们考察了初始工作转型的特征如何与长期收入相关，以及第一份工作转型的差异在多大程度上可以解释后来的社会经济地位收入差距。我们的结果表明，对许多毕业生来说，第一份工作转型是艰难的，强烈预测第五年的收入，并且是大学毕业后五年社会经济地位收入差距的重要中介——将无法解释的差距减少了近三分之二。

34365.title: Returns to Trainees in a Highly Regulated Labor Market
34365.zh_title: 高度监管劳动力市场中受训者的回报
34365.authors: Michael R. Richards, Jonathan Seward, Christopher M. Whaley
34365.abstract: Human capital formation enhances worker productivity and firm performance. However, firms may not fully internalize the financial benefits from investing in employee skill-building, which can disincentivize worker training and suggest roles for government support. We examine these tradeoffs in the context of physician training through “residency” programs. Using the universe of Medicare inpatient and outpatient records from 2014-2019 and differences-in-differences analyses, we show that hospitals’ productivity and revenues grow by 10-20% after underwriting a procedure-oriented residency––though heterogeneity exists. The hospitals benefiting from trainee labor conservatively net over $\$2$ million per year, revealing substantive private incentives to finance physician training.
34365.zh_abstract: 人力资本形成提高了工人生产率和企业绩效。然而，企业可能没有完全内化投资于员工技能建设的财务收益，这可能会抑制员工培训，并暗示政府支持的作用。我们在通过“住院医师”项目进行医生培训的背景下考察这些权衡。利用2014-2019年所有医疗保险住院和门诊记录以及双重差分分析，我们表明，在承办以操作为导向的住院医师项目后，医院的生产率和收入增长了10-20%——尽管存在异质性。从受训者劳动中受益的医院保守估计每年净赚超过200万美元，揭示了资助医生培训的实质性私人激励。
34365.meta: Programs：AG, EH, LS, PE；JEL：I11, I18, J24, J44

34364.title: Prosecutorial Reform and Local Crime Rates
34364.zh_title: 检察改革与地方犯罪率
34364.authors: Amanda Y. Agan, Jennifer L. Doleac, Anna Harvey, Anna Kyriazis, Lauren R. Schechter
34364.abstract: Many communities across the United States have elected reform-minded prosecutors who seek to safely reduce the reach and burden of the criminal justice system. In this paper, we use variation in the timing of when these prosecutors took office across jurisdictions to empirically characterize their policy changes and estimate downstream effects on prison incarceration rates, local reported crime rates, and drug mortality rates. We find that after a reform prosecutor takes office there are consistent and often statistically significant decreases in charging and conviction rates for nonviolent misdemeanor offenses, particularly misdemeanor drug offenses, but not for violent or felony offenses. We find little to no downstream effects on prison incarceration rates and no effects on local reported crime rates or drug mortality rates. These findings suggest that the types of policies being implemented by reform prosecutors appear to be decreasing the footprint of the criminal justice system without adverse effects on public safety.
34364.zh_abstract: 美国许多社区选举了具有改革意识的检察官，他们寻求在保障安全的同时减少刑事司法系统的覆盖范围和负担。在本文中，我们利用这些检察官在不同司法管辖区上任时间的差异，实证描述其政策变化，并估计对监狱监禁率、地方报告犯罪率和药物死亡率的下游影响。我们发现，在改革派检察官上任后，非暴力轻罪（尤其是轻罪毒品犯罪）的指控和定罪率持续且通常在统计上显著下降，但暴力犯罪或重罪则不然。我们发现对监狱监禁率几乎没有或没有下游影响，对地方报告犯罪率或药物死亡率也没有影响。这些发现表明，改革派检察官正在实施的政策类型似乎在不产生公共安全不利影响的情况下减少了刑事司法系统的足迹。

34363.title: A Narrative Account of the Great Inflation in the UK 1961-1997
34363.zh_title: 英国大通胀的叙事性分析（1961-1997）
34363.authors: Michael D. Bordo, Oliver Bush, Ryland Thomas
34363.abstract: This narrative paper provides a detailed account of the Great Inflation in the United Kingdom from 1961 to 1997, serving as a companion to the analytical account of fiscal policy presented in Bordo, Bush, and Thomas (2025). We discuss the background fundamentals in place at the outset of the Great Inflation and document the distinct phases of inflation, the unique features of the UK’s experience relative to other advanced economies, and the interplay between fiscal, monetary, and incomes policies. By placing the UK’s inflationary episodes within their institutional and historical context, this paper offers a qualitative perspective that complements the quantitative analysis of the main paper and informs ongoing debates about the causes and consequences of persistent inflation.
34363.zh_abstract: 这篇叙事性论文详细描述了1961年至1997年英国的大通胀，作为Bordo、Bush和Thomas（2025）财政政策分析性论述的补充。我们讨论了大通胀初期存在的背景基础，记录了通胀的不同阶段、英国相对于其他发达经济体的独特特征，以及财政、货币和收入政策之间的相互作用。通过将英国的通胀事件置于其制度和历史背景中，本文提供了一种定性视角，补充了主要论文的定量分析，并为关于持续通胀原因和后果的持续辩论提供了信息。

34362.title: The Lower Boundary of Workplace Mistreatment: Do Small Slights Matter?
34362.zh_title: 职场不当行为的边界：微小的怠慢重要吗？
34362.authors: Michal Hodor, Liat Eldor, Peter Cappelli
34362.abstract: Recent research in psychology, management, and more recently in economics, highlights the role of individual managers and their behavior in shaping employee performance. While emerging literature on harmful managerial behavior has focused primarily on severe forms of workplace mistreatment, especially various types of harassment, much less is known about its boundary conditions: How minor can a manager’s bad behavior be and still negatively affect employee performance? We study what appears to be a very minor workplace mistreatment—failing to deliver an expected birthday gift and greeting card on time—and examine its effect on subsequent employee performance. Using a dynamic difference-in-differences approach with detailed data from a national retail chain, we find that this small slight leads to over a 50% increase in employee absenteeism and a reduction of more than two working hours per month. Our analysis suggests that emotional responses to perceived workplace mistreatment drive the results. These findings indicate that even modest slights can meaningfully harm employee performance.
34362.zh_abstract: 心理学、管理学以及近期经济学的研究强调了管理者个人及其行为在塑造员工绩效中的作用。虽然关于有害管理行为的新兴文献主要关注严重的职场不当行为，特别是各种形式的骚扰，但对其边界条件的了解要少得多：管理者的不良行为可以有多轻微，却仍会对员工绩效产生负面影响？我们研究了一种看似非常轻微的职场不当行为——未能按时送达预期的生日礼物和贺卡——并考察其对后续员工绩效的影响。使用动态双重差分方法，结合一家全国性零售连锁店的详细数据，我们发现这种微小的怠慢导致员工缺勤率增加超过50%，每月工作时间减少超过两小时。我们的分析表明，对感知到的职场不当行为的情感反应驱动了这些结果。这些发现表明，即使是轻微的怠慢也能显著损害员工绩效。
34362.meta: Programs：LS；JEL：D23, J22, J24, J53, M50, M54

34359.title: China’s Lending to Developing Countries: From Boom to Bust
34359.zh_title: 中国对发展中国家的贷款：从繁荣到萧条
34359.authors: Sebastian Horn, Carmen M. Reinhart, Christoph Trebesch
34359.abstract: This paper provides a comprehensive overview of China’s lending to developing countries—a central feature of today’s international financial system. Building on our previous research and the work of others, we document the scale, destination, and terms of China’s overseas lending boom, as well as the lending bust and defaults that have followed. We compare China’s lending boom to past boom-bust cycles and discuss the implications of China’s rise as an international creditor on recipient countries and sovereign debt markets. The evidence indicates that Chinese state banks are assertive and commercially sophisticated lenders. For recipient countries, however, the jury is still out: it remains to be seen whether the gains from China’s lending—through growth and improved infrastructure—will outweigh the more immediate burdens of debt service or the multifaceted costs of default.
34359.zh_abstract: 本文全面概述了中国对发展中国家的贷款——这是当今国际金融体系的一个核心特征。基于我们之前的研究和其他学者的工作，我们记录了中国海外贷款繁荣的规模、目的地和条款，以及随之而来的贷款萧条和违约。我们将中国的贷款繁荣与过去的繁荣-萧条周期进行比较，并讨论中国作为国际债权人的崛起对受援国和主权债务市场的影响。证据表明，中国国有银行是自信且商业上精明的贷款人。然而，对于受援国来说，结论尚不确定：中国贷款通过增长和基础设施改善带来的收益，是否会超过偿债的直接负担或违约的多方面成本，仍有待观察。
34359.meta: Programs：IFM, ME；JEL：E3, F34, F65, F68, N2

34358.title: Optimal Trade Policies and Market Power in General Equilibrium Trade Models
34358.zh_title: 一般均衡贸易模型中的最优贸易政策与市场势力
34358.authors: Yan Bai, Dan Lu, Hanxi Wang
34358.abstract: We derive optimal trade policies in a multi-country, multi-sector general-equilibrium model that unifies a wide range of supply-side assumptions. Under our CES supply system, which nests most existing specifications, two-country optimal tariffs and export taxes across sectors depend only on elasticity parameters and relative market shares. With multiple countries, country and sector interdependencies—due to the cross-country trade network—make optimal tariffs imposed by the home country differ across countries and sectors while converging within sectors. Only when foreign countries do not trade with each other do the home country’s optimal policies depend solely on bilateral trade. Using trade data, we quantify optimal policies and find that ignoring interdependencies can lead to substantially lower welfare gains for the home country.
34358.zh_abstract: 我们在一个多国、多部门的一般均衡模型中推导最优贸易政策，该模型统一了广泛的供给侧假设。在我们的CES供给体系下（该体系涵盖了大多数现有设定），两国的跨部门最优关税和出口税仅取决于弹性参数和相对市场份额。在多国情况下，由于跨国贸易网络的存在，国家和部门之间的相互依赖性使得本国征收的最优关税在不同国家和部门之间有所不同，但在部门内部趋于一致。只有当外国之间不进行贸易时，本国的最优政策才仅取决于双边贸易。利用贸易数据，我们量化了最优政策，并发现忽略相互依赖性可能导致本国的福利收益大幅降低。

34357.title: The Global Economic Impact of Climate Change: An Empirical Perspective
34357.zh_title: 气候变化的全球经济影响：一个实证视角
34357.abstract: Empirical research has revolutionized how we understand the global economic impacts of climate change. Recent empirical analyses have tested theoretical ideas, challenged prior estimates, and revealed important and unexpected impacts. Further, the credibility and replicability of empirical results have played a critical role in guiding high-stakes climate policies. Here, I describe the landscape of empirical economic research on global impacts, I explain elements of modern analyses, I summarize recent findings on a range of topics, and I point towards promising new areas of investigation. In particular, I focus on empirical perspectives for six “grand challenges” in the field: understanding climate change’s global impact on economic output, health, conflict, food security, disasters, and migration. Overall, I argue that interwoven empirical findings across outcomes are aligning to paint an increasingly coherent picture of a future global economy impacted by climate change. Taking the literature as a whole, the global consequences of unmitigated climate change are likely to be substantial, unequal, negative in net economic value and potentially destabilizing.
34357.zh_abstract: 实证研究彻底改变了我们理解气候变化全球经济影响的方式。近期的实证分析检验了理论观点，挑战了先前的估计，并揭示了重要且意想不到的影响。此外，实证结果的可信度和可复制性在指导高风险气候政策中发挥了关键作用。在此，我描述了全球影响实证经济研究的格局，解释了现代分析的要素，总结了近期在多个主题上的发现，并指出了有前景的新研究领域。特别是，我聚焦于该领域六个“重大挑战”的实证视角：理解气候变化对经济产出、健康、冲突、粮食安全、灾害和移民的全球影响。总体而言，我认为跨结果交织的实证发现正在趋同，描绘出一幅日益连贯的未来受气候变化影响的全球经济图景。从整个文献来看，未经缓解的气候变化的全球后果可能是巨大的、不平等的、经济净值为负的，并且可能具有破坏性。
34357.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, EEE, EFG, EH, IFM, ITI, LS, PE, POL；JEL：Q54

34356.title: The Economic Geography of American Slavery
34356.zh_title: 美国奴隶制的经济地理学
34356.authors: Treb Allen, Winston Chen, Suresh Naidu
34356.abstract: What would the antebellum American economy have looked like without slavery? Using new micro-data on the U.S. economy in 1860, we document that where free and enslaved workers live and how much they earn correlates strongly—but differently—with geographic proxies for agricultural productivity, disease, and ease of slave escape. To explain these patterns, we build a quantitative spatial model of slavery, where slaveholders coerce enslaved workers into supplying more labor, capture the proceeds of their labor, and assign them to sectors and occupations that maximize owner profits rather than worker welfare. Combining theory and data, we then quantify how dismantling the institution of slavery affected the spatial economy. We find that the economic impacts of emancipation are substantial, generating welfare gains for the enslaved of roughly 1,200%, while reducing welfare of free workers by 0.7% and eliminating slaveholder profit. Aggregate GDP rises by 9.1%, with a contraction in agricultural productivity counteracted by an expansion in manufacturing and services driven by an exodus of formerly enslaved workers out of agriculture and into the U.S. North.
34356.zh_abstract: 如果没有奴隶制，战前美国经济会是什么样子？利用1860年美国经济的新微观数据，我们记录了自由工人和奴隶工人居住地及其收入与农业生产力、疾病和奴隶逃脱难易程度的地理代理变量之间存在强烈但不同的相关性。为了解释这些模式，我们构建了一个奴隶制的定量空间模型，其中奴隶主强迫奴隶工人提供更多劳动，占有其劳动成果，并将他们分配到最大化所有者利润而非工人福利的部门和职业。结合理论和数据，我们随后量化了废除奴隶制制度如何影响空间经济。我们发现，解放的经济影响是巨大的：为奴隶带来约1200%的福利收益，同时使自由工人的福利降低0.7%，并消除了奴隶主的利润。总GDP增长9.1%，其中农业生产力的收缩被制造业和服务业的扩张所抵消，后者由前奴隶工人从农业流向美国北部所驱动。
34356.meta: Programs：DAE, ITI, LS；JEL：J47, N51, O17, R1

34355.title: From the Classroom to the Ballot Box: Turnout and Partisan Consequences of Education
34355.zh_title: 从课堂到投票箱：教育的投票率与党派后果
34355.authors: Ethan Kaplan, Jörg L. Spenkuch, Cody Tuttle
34355.abstract: We estimate the impact of education on voter turnout and partisanship using a regression discontinuity design based on school-entry cutoffs and exact date of birth. Drawing on nationwide administrative voter registration data, we find that individuals who were slotted to enter school one year earlier are more likely to vote and more likely to register as independents. These reduced-form effects may be driven by changes in educational attainment or by differences in the quality of individuals’ educational experiences. We leverage age-related heterogeneity in effect sizes to isolate the role of educational attainment. Our results imply that an additional year of schooling increases turnout by about 3 percentage points.
34355.zh_abstract: 我们利用基于入学截止日期和确切出生日期的断点回归设计，估计了教育对选民投票率和党派倾向的影响。利用全国性的行政选民登记数据，我们发现，被安排早一年入学的个体更有可能投票，也更有可能登记为独立选民。这些简化形式效应可能由教育程度的改变或个体教育经历质量的差异所驱动。我们利用效应大小的年龄相关异质性来分离教育程度的作用。我们的结果表明，每增加一年教育，投票率提高约3个百分点。

34354.title: Transport in Low- and Middle-income Countries
34354.zh_title: 低收入和中等收入国家的交通
34354.abstract: This brief survey reviews recent work on transportation in poor and middle-income countries. After reviewing a few key global facts and taking stock of the data available, it focuses on eight key themes that are emphasized in this literature relative to work on transportation in rich countries. In urban areas, these are private/informal transit, interactions with other informal markets, gender, bus rapid transit, and quantity-based congestion policy. Elsewhere, they are the legacy of colonialism, rural roads, and potential negative effects of improved transportation infrastructure.
34354.zh_abstract: 这篇简短的综述回顾了关于贫困和中等收入国家交通的最新研究。在回顾几个关键的全球事实并盘点现有数据后，它聚焦于该文献相对于富裕国家交通研究强调的八个关键主题。在城市地区，这些主题是私人/非正规交通、与其他非正规市场的互动、性别、快速公交系统和基于数量的拥堵政策。在其他地区，这些主题是殖民主义的遗产、农村道路以及改善交通基础设施可能带来的负面影响。

34353.title: What the Mercantilists Got Right
34353.zh_title: 重商主义者做对了什么
34353.abstract: Economics students today learn about mercantilism through Smith’s prism, as a series of logical and policy errors that Smith clarified and settled for good. But far from settled doctrine, mercantilism encapsulated a variety of pragmatic practices that survived Smith’s critique, often to good effect. It found echo in a continuous tradition of what later came to be called “developmentalism,” running from Alexander Hamilton and Friedrich List’s advocacy of trade protection to Hans Singer and Raul Prebisch’s ideas on import-substitution and, more recently, to East Asian models of export-oriented industrialization. Three of its core tenets hold continued appeal: the primacy of production and jobs (and of their composition) over consumption; preference for close, collaborative relationship between business and government over an arms’ length relationship; and the need for contextual, pragmatic, and often unorthodox policies over universal remedies and “best-practices.”
34353.zh_abstract: 如今的经济学学生通过斯密的棱镜来学习重商主义，将其视为一系列逻辑和政策错误，斯密澄清并一劳永逸地解决了这些问题。但重商主义远非定论，它包含了多种实用实践，这些实践经受住了斯密的批评，并且常常产生良好效果。它在后来被称为“发展主义”的连续传统中找到了共鸣，从亚历山大·汉密尔顿和弗里德里希·李斯特倡导贸易保护，到汉斯·辛格和劳尔·普雷维什关于进口替代的思想，以及更近期的东亚出口导向型工业化模式。其三个核心信条持续具有吸引力：生产和就业（及其构成）优先于消费；偏好企业与政府之间紧密、合作的关系，而非保持距离的关系；以及需要因地制宜、务实且往往非正统的政策，而非普适性疗法和“最佳实践”。

34352.title: Repeated Matching Games An Empirical Framework
34352.zh_title: 重复匹配博弈：一个实证框架
34352.authors: Pauline Corblet, Jeremy T. Fox, Alfred Galichon
34352.abstract: Removed at the request of the authors. An updated version will be posted shortly.
34352.zh_abstract: 应作者要求移除。更新版本将很快发布。
34352.meta: Programs：IO, LS, TWP；JEL：C1, C78, J20, L10

34351.title: Jealousy of Trade: Exclusionary Preferences and Economic Nationalism
34351.zh_title: 贸易的嫉妒：排他性偏好与经济民族主义
34351.authors: Alex Imas, Kristóf Madarász, Heather Sarsons
34351.abstract: This paper presents a new framework for understanding economic nationalism based on an empirically-validated desire for mimetic dominance that generates a preference for exclusionary policies. We incorporate such preferences into a frictionless model of international trade. Exclusionary preferences lead people to favor tariffs and protectionist policies that harm both their trading partner’s and their own consumption. This implies that higher prices caused by exclusionary policies like tariffs will be more acceptable than those caused by non-exclusionary policies. We provide support for these predictions through two survey experiments, which also account for the role of cognitive biases and misinformation.
34351.zh_abstract: 本文提出了一个理解经济民族主义的新框架，该框架基于一种经实证验证的、对模仿性支配的渴望，这种渴望产生了对排他性政策的偏好。我们将此类偏好纳入一个无摩擦的国际贸易模型中。排他性偏好导致人们支持关税和保护主义政策，这些政策既损害贸易伙伴的消费，也损害自身的消费。这意味着，由关税等排他性政策导致的价格上涨，将比由非排他性政策导致的价格上涨更容易被接受。我们通过两项调查实验为这些预测提供了支持，这些实验也考虑了认知偏差和错误信息的作用。

34350.title: Big Beautiful Numbers: The Impact of Governmental Data on Firms' Valuations
34350.zh_title: 大而美的数字：政府数据对企业估值的影响
34350.abstract: I use the prices of financial options to study the value of macroeconomic data produced by the Bureau of Labor Statistics and the Bureau of Economic Analysis. I show that options traders expect several data products to contain information relevant to valuations of firms throughout the economy. The most affected firms tend to be larger and more capital-intensive. Traders especially anticipate data releases in more recent years and in periods of high uncertainty about economic policy. Traders expect more relevant information from U.S. government data products than from Federal Reserve policy statements and minutes.
34350.zh_abstract: 我利用金融期权的价格来研究劳工统计局和经济分析局生产的宏观经济数据的价值。我表明，期权交易者预期若干数据产品包含对整个经济中企业估值相关的信息。受影响最大的企业往往规模更大、资本密集度更高。交易者尤其预期在最近几年以及经济政策高度不确定时期的发布数据。交易者预期从美国政府数据产品中获得的相关信息多于从美联储政策声明和会议纪要中获得的信息。

34349.title: Introducing The SPEAK: A Scalable Computer-Adaptive Tool to Measure Knowledge of Early Human Development
