34349.zh_title: 引入SPEAK：一种可扩展的计算机自适应工具，用于测量早期人类发展知识
34349.authors: Caroline Gaudreau, Dani Levine, John A. List, Dana Suskind
34349.abstract: Research shows responsive caregiving enhances children's brain development, with parental knowledge predicting positive behaviors and outcomes. However, knowledge varies widely across educational levels, highlighting the need for targeted interventions. Despite evidence that this knowledge can be improved, no comprehensive metric exists for efficient assessment. We introduce SPEAK (Survey of Parent/Provider Expectations and Knowledge), a computer-adaptive tool grounded in item-response theory that we created, to address this gap by measuring parental and educator knowledge across development domains with precision and speed. This paper details SPEAK's development, including domain construction, cognitive interviewing, expert review, psychometric calibration, and validity evidence. SPEAK offers a flexible, scalable solution for clinical, educational, research, and policy settings. By identifying knowledge gaps, it enables tailored interventions, supports professional development, and informs policy, ultimately improving parent-child interactions and child outcomes. Our tool bridges critical gaps in assessing child development knowledge, advancing research and cross-sector collaboration to promote early childhood development worldwide.
34349.zh_abstract: 研究表明，回应性照护能促进儿童大脑发育，而父母的知识能预测积极的行为和结果。然而，不同教育水平的知识差异很大，凸显了针对性干预的必要性。尽管有证据表明这种知识可以得到改善，但缺乏用于高效评估的全面指标。我们引入了SPEAK（父母/提供者期望与知识调查），这是一种基于项目反应理论、我们创建的计算机自适应工具，旨在通过精确且快速的方式测量父母和教育工作者在多个发展领域的知识，以填补这一空白。本文详细介绍了SPEAK的开发过程，包括领域构建、认知访谈、专家评审、心理测量校准和效度证据。SPEAK为临床、教育、研究和政策环境提供了一种灵活、可扩展的解决方案。通过识别知识差距，它能够实现量身定制的干预、支持专业发展并为政策提供信息，最终改善亲子互动和儿童发展结果。我们的工具弥合了评估儿童发展知识方面的关键差距，推动了研究和跨部门合作，以促进全球幼儿发展。
34349.meta: Programs：CH, DAE, ED, LS, PE；JEL：C81, C90, C93, I12, I18, I21, J13, O15

34348.title: Navigating the ‘Problem from Hell’: A Guide to Climate Damages
34348.zh_title: 驾驭“来自地狱的问题”：气候损害指南
34348.authors: Derek Lemoine, Catherine Hausman, Jeffrey G. Shrader
34348.abstract: Multiple lines of research aim to quantify the economic impacts of climate change. We show that the effects of climate change on economic activity depend on how climate change alters weather across time and space. Changes in contemporary weather have direct effects on output; changes in past weather and in expectations of future weather induce adaptation; and changes in weather elsewhere around the globe introduce a general equilibrium effect. Using this framework, we argue that estimation of climate impacts faces a trilemma. A methodology can have at most two of: (i) robustness to a particular economic model’s structure, (ii) interpretation as effects of persistent, widespread, anticipated climate change, and (iii) quasi-experimental identification. We summarize the literature on climate damages in light of the trilemma. A solid body of knowledge has developed around direct effects, and recent work has made substantial progress towards understanding adaptation and spatial spillovers.
34348.zh_abstract: 多条研究路线旨在量化气候变化的经济影响。我们表明，气候变化对经济活动的影响取决于气候变化如何随时间与空间改变天气。当代天气的变化对产出有直接影响；过去天气的变化以及对未来天气的预期会引发适应；而全球其他地区天气的变化则引入了一般均衡效应。利用这一框架，我们认为气候影响的估计面临一个三难困境。一种方法论最多只能具备以下两点：(i) 对特定经济模型结构的稳健性，(ii) 可解释为持久、广泛、预期的气候变化的影响，以及 (iii) 准实验识别。我们根据这一三难困境总结了关于气候损害的文献。围绕直接影响已经形成了坚实的知识体系，而近期研究在理解适应和空间溢出效应方面取得了实质性进展。
34348.meta: Programs：EEE, EFG；JEL：C23, C51, F18, O13, Q17, Q51, Q54, R11

34347.title: What is More Important for Subjective Longevity Expectations: Perceived Health or Income?
34347.zh_title: 对于主观寿命预期，感知健康与收入哪个更重要？
34347.abstract: This research considers the role of income for subjective longevity assessments. The analysis uses the 2022 Survey of Consumer Finances. My findings indicate that treating subjective health and longevity assessments as jointly determined is important to understanding the role of income for both judgments. Income has a positive effect on health judgments and does not have a statistically significant effect on subjective longevity when health is rated as excellent or good. Surveys framing the longevity question in direct or probabilistic terms may have complementary roles in estimating subjective longevity.
34347.zh_abstract: 本研究探讨了收入在主观寿命评估中的作用。分析使用了2022年消费者金融调查。我的发现表明，将主观健康和寿命评估视为共同决定因素，对于理解收入对这两项判断的作用至关重要。当健康被评为优秀或良好时，收入对健康判断有正向影响，但对主观寿命没有统计上显著的影响。以直接或概率形式提出寿命问题的调查，在估计主观寿命方面可能具有互补作用。

34346.title: The Impacts of Romantic Relationships with the Boss
34346.zh_title: 与上司的浪漫关系的影响
34346.authors: David C. Macdonald, Jerry Montonen, Emily E. Nix
34346.abstract: Romantic relationships in the workplace are common, but those between managers and subordinates have increasingly drawn scrutiny. Using administrative data on the universe of cohabiting couples in Finland, we examine the career implications of starting or ending a personal relationship with a workplace manager and the spillovers of these relationships on the broader workforce. An event study design reveals that entering a relationship with a manager increases the subordinate's earnings by 6%, but breaking up triggers an abrupt 18% earnings decline. We also find that these relationships generate spillovers: retention of other workers declines by six percentage points, with effects concentrated in workplaces where subordinates experience greater earnings gains. Our findings highlight both the private benefits and organizational costs of hierarchical workplace relationships.
34346.zh_abstract: 工作场所的浪漫关系很常见，但管理者与下属之间的关系日益受到审视。利用芬兰所有同居伴侣的行政数据，我们研究了开始或结束与工作场所管理者的个人关系对职业的影响，以及这些关系对更广泛劳动力的溢出效应。一项事件研究设计显示，与管理者建立关系会使下属的收入增加6%，但分手会引发收入急剧下降18%。我们还发现，这些关系会产生溢出效应：其他员工的留任率下降6个百分点，其影响集中在那些下属收入增长更大的工作场所。我们的研究结果突显了层级制工作场所关系的私人利益和组织成本。

34345.title: Gender-Based Violence and Judge Responses
34345.zh_title: 基于性别的暴力与法官回应
34345.authors: Xiqian Cai, Shuai Chen, Zhengquan Cheng, Emily E. Nix
34345.abstract: In China, only 37% of divorce petitions citing domestic violence are granted, with evidence suggesting that judges often prioritize preserving marriages even in cases of abuse. We investigate whether judicial decision-making can shift in response to broader social change. Exploiting the rise of the #MeToo movement, which reshaped societal perceptions of gender-based violence, we find that female judges in China became 8 percentage points more likely to grant divorces in domestic violence cases. These results suggest that judicial attitudes and actions on gender-based violence cases are malleable.
34345.zh_abstract: 在中国，仅有37%的以家庭暴力为由的离婚申请获得批准，有证据表明，即使在虐待案件中，法官也常常优先考虑维持婚姻。我们研究司法决策是否能因更广泛的社会变革而发生转变。利用#MeToo运动的兴起（该运动重塑了社会对基于性别的暴力的认知），我们发现中国女性法官在家庭暴力案件中批准离婚的可能性提高了8个百分点。这些结果表明，法官在基于性别的暴力案件上的态度和行动是可塑的。

34344.title: What is the Best Response? Examining the Impact of Police and Their Alternatives
34344.zh_title: 什么是最佳回应？考察警察及其替代方案的影响
34344.authors: Bocar A. Ba, Patton Chen, Tony Cheng, Martha C. Eies, Justin E. Holz
34344.abstract: Cities across America are adopting civilian crisis response programs as alternatives to traditional policing, yet causal evidence on their impact and cost-effectiveness is scarce. This paper evaluates Durham, North Carolina’s HEART program, which diverts nonviolent 911 calls from police. Using a difference-in-differences design, we find that HEART reduces crime reports, arrests, and response times—primarily through civilian phone and in-person responses, rather than police-civilian co-responses. The program increases future 911 calls, which suggests it fosters public trust. Based on an original contingent valuation survey and applying the marginal value of public funds framework, we conclude that HEART is a fiscally self-sustainable intervention.
34344.zh_abstract: 美国各地城市正在采用平民危机应对项目作为传统警务的替代方案，但关于其影响和成本效益的因果证据却很少。本文评估了北卡罗来纳州达勒姆市的HEART项目，该项目将非暴力的911报警电话从警察分流出去。使用双重差分设计，我们发现HEART减少了犯罪报告、逮捕和响应时间——这主要通过平民电话和现场回应实现，而非警察与平民的共同回应。该项目增加了未来的911报警电话，这表明它增强了公众信任。基于一项原始的条件价值评估调查，并应用公共资金边际价值框架，我们得出结论：HEART是一项财政上自我可持续的干预措施。

34343.title: Supervising Failing Banks
34343.authors: Sergio A. Correia, Stephan Luck, Emil Verner
34343.abstract: This paper studies the role of banking supervision in anticipating, monitoring, and disciplining failing banks. We document that supervisors anticipate most bank failures with a high degree of accuracy. Supervisors play an important role in requiring troubled banks to recognize losses, taking enforcement actions, and ultimately closing failing banks. To establish causality, we exploit exogenous variation in supervisory strictness during the Global Financial Crisis. Stricter supervision leads to more loss recognition, reduced dividend payouts, and an increase in the likelihood and speed of closure. Increased strictness entails a trade-off between a lower resolution cost to the FDIC and reduced credit.
34343.zh_abstract: 本文研究了银行监管在预测、监控和惩戒濒临倒闭银行中的作用。我们记录到，监管机构能够以很高的准确度预测大多数银行倒闭。监管机构在要求问题银行确认损失、采取执法行动以及最终关闭濒临倒闭银行方面发挥着重要作用。为了建立因果关系，我们利用了全球金融危机期间监管严格程度的外生变化。更严格的监管导致更多的损失确认、减少股息支付，并提高了银行关闭的可能性和速度。增加严格程度意味着在降低联邦存款保险公司的处置成本与减少信贷之间进行权衡。

34342.title: Asset Returns as Carbon Taxes
34342.authors: Lautaro Chittaro, Monika Piazzesi, Marcelo J. Sena, Martin Schneider
34342.abstract: In frictionless financial markets, a carbon tax on energy users provides the same incentives as a replicating asset price schedule that depends on emissions. In particular, the replicating rate of return on a firm increases linearly in scope 1 emissions relative to enterprise value. We use this result to interpret pollution premia measured by recent empirical studies and conclude that markets currently provide only modest incentives. Replicating a serious carbon tax requires high returns in the right tail of the emission intensity distribution. With heterogeneous investors, such returns are not sustainable unless essentially everyone perceives large nonpecuniary costs from holding dirty capital. Substantial emission reductions can be achieved, however, when even a small share of investors perceive nonpecuniary benefits from owning clean electricity capital.
34342.zh_abstract: 在无摩擦的金融市场中，对能源使用者征收的碳税与一个依赖于排放量的复制性资产价格表提供了相同的激励。特别是，企业的复制性回报率相对于企业价值，与范围一排放量呈线性增长。我们利用这一结果来解释近期实证研究测得的污染溢价，并得出结论：市场目前仅提供了适度的激励。要复制一项严厉的碳税，需要在排放强度分布的右尾端实现高回报。在存在异质性投资者的情况下，除非基本上每个人都认为持有肮脏资本会产生巨大的非金钱成本，否则这种回报是不可持续的。然而，即使只有一小部分投资者认为拥有清洁电力资本能带来非金钱收益，也能实现显著的减排。
34342.meta: Programs：AP, EEE, EFG, ME；JEL：E0, G0, Q0

34341.title: Tolls on Entrepreneurs from Capital Market Distortions: Evidence from IPO Locational Choices
34341.zh_title: 资本市场扭曲对企业家征收的“过路费”：来自IPO地点选择的证据
34341.authors: Qu Feng, Shang-Jin Wei, Guiying Laura Wu, Mengying Yuan
34341.abstract: Capital controls and other policy distortions in the capital market are costly to entrepreneurs. We propose a structural estimation approach to quantify the effect using IPO locational choices. We estimate the willingness-to-pay to bypass these distortions by the Chinese entrepreneurs with overseas listed firms to be a haircut in firm value by 50-60%. We infer that the welfare for the entrepreneurs could rise by 22% from the relevant capital market reforms.
34341.zh_abstract: 资本管制和其他资本市场政策扭曲对企业家而言代价高昂。我们提出了一种结构性估计方法，利用IPO地点选择来量化其影响。我们估计，拥有海外上市公司的中国企业家为绕过这些扭曲而愿意支付的代价，相当于企业价值折让50-60%。我们推断，相关的资本市场改革可使企业家的福利提高22%。

34340.title: Measuring What Matters: Why Italy May Be in Better Fiscal Shape than the US
34340.zh_title: 衡量什么才是重要的：为什么意大利的财政状况可能比美国更好
34340.authors: Emanuele Dicarlo, Laurence J. Kotlikoff, Mauro Marè, Marco Olivari
34340.abstract: This study uses fiscal gap accounting (FGA) and generational accounting (GA) to compare US and Italian fiscal solvency. FGA and GA incorporate all government outlays and receipts, whether put on or kept off the books. FGA measures, in the form of reduced net outlays, the constant share of each future year’s GDP needed to balance the government’s intertemporal budget. GA calculates the lifetime net tax rate – lifetime taxes divided by lifetime labor earnings -- facing future generations if current generations pay nothing more, on net, than current policy mandates. Deficit accounting suggests that Italy’s 135 percent debt-to-GDP ratio places it in worse fiscal shape than the US with its 123 percent ratio. But on a fiscal-gap basis, Italy appears in far better shape regardless of the discount rate used. Based on the theoretically appropriate rate – the average real return to national wealth, the U.S. fiscal gap is 7.4%. Italy’s is 4.0%. These requisite solvency adjustments are far larger if delayed or if the UN’s more pessimistic demographic projections prevail. Neither country can expect future generations, on their own, to cover their government’s red ink. Doing so requires levying lifetime net tax rates, in each country, that exceed 100%.
34340.zh_abstract: 本研究使用财政缺口核算和代际核算来比较美国和意大利的财政偿付能力。财政缺口核算和代际核算纳入了政府的所有支出和收入，无论其是否被记录在账。财政缺口核算以净支出减少的形式，衡量平衡政府跨期预算所需的未来每年GDP的恒定份额。代际核算计算了如果当前一代人净支付不超过现行政策规定，未来一代人面临的终身净税率——终身税收除以终身劳动收入。赤字核算表明，意大利135%的债务与GDP比率使其财政状况比美国（123%的比率）更差。但基于财政缺口，无论使用何种贴现率，意大利的状况似乎都要好得多。基于理论上合适的利率——国民财富的平均实际回报率，美国的财政缺口为7.4%，意大利为4.0%。如果延迟调整，或者如果联合国更悲观的人口预测成为现实，这些必要的偿付能力调整幅度会大得多。这两个国家都不能指望未来一代人独自弥补其政府的财政赤字。这样做需要在每个国家征收超过100%的终身净税率。

34339.title: Ten Years of Relational Power: The Long-Run Effects of Teaching Negotiation Skills to Adolescent Girls
34339.zh_title: 关系权力的十年：向青春期女孩教授谈判技巧的长期影响
34339.authors: Nava Ashraf, Natalie Bau, Corinne Low, Xiaoyue Shan
34339.abstract: We evaluate the effects of teaching negotiation skills to adolescent girls in economically vulnerable compounds in Lusaka, Zambia ten years later. Treated participants complete 0.23 more years of education. Consistent with greater relational empowerment, they also begin sexual activity later, have smaller age gaps with their husbands, and express less traditional gender attitudes. Using a surrogate approach, social benefits and costs from increased education alone suggest the intervention generated 6.6 dollars for every dollar spent and had a very high marginal value of public funds of 9.0.
34339.zh_abstract: 我们评估了十年前向赞比亚卢萨卡经济脆弱社区的青春期女孩教授谈判技巧的效果。接受干预的参与者多完成了0.23年的教育。与更强的关系赋权相一致，她们也更晚开始性行为，与丈夫的年龄差距更小，并且表现出更少的传统性别态度。使用替代方法，仅从教育增加带来的社会收益和成本来看，该干预措施每花费1美元产生了6.6美元的回报，并且公共资金边际价值非常高，达到9.0。
34339.meta: Programs：CH, DEV, ED, LS；JEL：I12, I21, J24, O12

34395.title: Log-Linear Relative Asset Demand
34395.zh_title: 对数线性相对资产需求
34395.abstract: This paper studies the theoretical underpinnings of log-linear models of relative asset demand. It shows that log-linearity provides a poor approximation - in both a global and local sense - to asset demand functions implied by standard portfolio optimization theory. Instead, log-linearity is consistent with a model of portfolio choice in which the investor views the payoffs of different assets, within any state of the world, as being imperfectly substitutable. Equilibria in this model, and all other models that generate log-linear relative asset demand, are generically inconsistent with the existence of a positive stochastic discount factor. I argue that these results imply that the demand system asset pricing approach represents a radically new way to interpret financial market data.
34395.zh_abstract: 本文研究了对数线性相对资产需求模型的理论基础。它表明，无论在全局还是局部意义上，对数线性化对标准投资组合优化理论所隐含的资产需求函数都提供了较差的近似。相反，对数线性化与一种投资组合选择模型一致，在该模型中，投资者认为不同资产在任何世界状态下的回报都是不完全可替代的。该模型以及所有其他产生对数线性相对资产需求的模型中的均衡，通常与正随机贴现因子的存在不一致。我认为这些结果意味着，需求系统资产定价方法代表了一种解释金融市场数据的全新方式。

34394.title: Career Concerns in Collective Decision-Making: The Federal Open Market Committee
34394.zh_title: 集体决策中的职业关切：联邦公开市场委员会
34394.authors: Matias Iaryczower, Gabriel Lopez-Moctezuma, Paola Moscariello
34394.abstract: In this paper, we quantify the distortions induced by career concerns within the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC). We combine a structural approach with an unanticipated change in the information available to the public about internal committee deliberations. We show that—given the policy preferences of Fed Presidents and Board Governors serving in the FOMC—agents' incentives to appear competent and unbiased outweigh the distortions induced by anti-pandering and conformity. Relative to a counterfactual with no reputational considerations, career concerns improve the welfare of an unbiased principal. Given our estimates of career concerns, Transparency improves welfare relative to an Opaque regime in which internal deliberations are not made public. In a counterfactual exercise, we show that greater heterogeneity in regional shocks reduces conformity but increases policy errors under Transparency.
34394.zh_abstract: 在本文中，我们量化了联邦公开市场委员会（FOMC）内部职业关切所导致的扭曲。我们将结构性方法与公众可获取的关于委员会内部审议信息的意外变化相结合。我们表明，考虑到在FOMC任职的联储行长和理事会理事的政策偏好，代理人表现出称职和无偏见的激励超过了反迎合和从众行为所导致的扭曲。相对于一个没有声誉考量的反事实情景，职业关切提高了无偏委托人（principal）的福利。根据我们对职业关切的估计，相对于内部审议不公开的“不透明”制度，“透明”制度提高了福利。在一个反事实模拟中，我们表明，在透明制度下，区域冲击的更大异质性会减少从众行为，但会增加政策失误。

34393.title: Productivity Catch-Up or Factor Shift in the Race for Global Industrial Dominance
34393.zh_title: 全球工业主导地位竞争中的生产率追赶还是要素转移
34393.authors: Ting-Wei Lai, Shin-Kun Peng, Raymond G. Riezman, Ping Wang
34393.abstract: We examine global trends in productivity and sectoral dominance across countries and industries, asking whether changes are driven by productivity catch-up or shifts in factor endowments. To address this, we develop a general-equilibrium, multi-country, multi-sector model with a global production network based on international input--output linkages. The model incorporates country-specific technologies, factor endowments (skilled and unskilled labor and capital), and tariffs. Calibrating the model to international data from 1996 to 2007, we find that in high-income countries productivity changes are mainly driven by technology, while in middle-income countries capital is most crucial. We then assess whether these changes explain structural transformation in global output shares. For most industries where one group of countries overtakes another, the primary cause is the change in capital and skilled labor, rather than factor-induced productivity improvements. Overall, factor endowment shifts play the central role in explaining changes in sectoral dominance across countries and industries.
34393.zh_abstract: 我们考察了各国和各行业的生产率与行业主导地位的全球趋势，探究这些变化是由生产率追赶还是要素禀赋转移驱动的。为此，我们构建了一个基于国际投入产出联系、包含全球生产网络的一般均衡多国多部门模型。该模型纳入了各国特定的技术、要素禀赋（熟练与非熟练劳动力和资本）以及关税。将模型校准至1996年至2007年的国际数据，我们发现，在高收入国家，生产率变化主要由技术驱动，而在中等收入国家，资本最为关键。随后，我们评估了这些变化是否解释了全球产出份额的结构转型。对于大多数某一国家群体超越另一群体的行业，首要原因是资本和熟练劳动力的变化，而非要素引致的生产率改进。总体而言，要素禀赋转移在解释各国和各行业部门主导地位的变化中起着核心作用。
34393.meta: Programs：DEV, EFG, ITI；JEL：E23, F11, F62, O11

34392.title: Who Pays for Tariffs Along the Supply Chain? Evidence from European Wine Tariffs
34392.zh_title: 供应链中谁为关税买单？来自欧洲葡萄酒关税的证据
34392.authors: Aaron B. Flaaen, Ali Hortaçsu, Felix Tintelnot, Nicolás Urdaneta, Daniel Xu
34392.abstract: We study how tariffs affect prices along the supply chain using product-level data from a large U.S. wine importer during the 2019-2021 U.S. tariffs on European wines. Combining confidential transaction prices with foreign suppliers, U.S. distributors, and retail prices, we trace tariff passthrough from producers to consumers. Pass-through at the border is incomplete, yet consumers paid more than the tariff revenue collected. The dollar markups per bottle for the importer contracted, but expanded for the combined distributor-retailer segment. Price changes along the chain reached consumers after one year. We also document tariff engineering that biases unit values in trade statistics.
34392.zh_abstract: 我们利用2019-2021年美国对欧洲葡萄酒征收关税期间一家大型美国葡萄酒进口商的产品层面数据，研究关税如何影响供应链上的价格。通过将保密的交易价格与外国供应商、美国分销商和零售价格相结合，我们追溯了关税从生产者到消费者的传导。边境的传导是不完全的，然而消费者支付的费用超过了征收的关税收入。进口商的每瓶美元加价收缩了，但分销商-零售商联合环节的加价扩大了。供应链上的价格变化在一年后传导至消费者。我们还记录了扭曲贸易统计中单位价值的关税操纵行为。
34392.meta: Programs：IFM, IO, ITI, PR；JEL：F13, F14, L66, L81

34391.title: The Ripple Effects of China’s College Expansion on American Universities
34391.zh_title: 中国大学扩招对美国大学的涟漪效应
34391.authors: Ruixue Jia, Gaurav Khanna, Hongbin Li, Yuli Xu
34391.abstract: China’s unprecedented expansion of higher education in 1999, increased annual college enrollment from 1 million to 9.6 million by 2020. We trace the global ripple effects of that expansion by examining its impact on US graduate education and local economies surrounding college towns. Combining administrative data from China’s college admissions system and US visa data, we leverage the centralized quota system governing Chinese college admissions for identification and present three key findings. First, the expansion of Chinese undergraduate education drove graduate student flows to the US: every additional 100 college graduates in China led to 3.6 Chinese graduate students in the US. Second, Chinese master’s students generated positive spillovers, driving the birth of new master’s programs, and increasing the number of other international and American master’s students, particularly in STEM fields. And third, the influx of international students supported local economies around college towns, raising job creation rates outside the universities, as well. Our findings highlight how domestic education policy in one country can reshape the academic and economic landscape of another through student migration and its broader spillovers.
34391.zh_abstract: 中国在1999年进行了前所未有的高等教育扩张，到2020年，年度大学招生人数从100万增加到960万。我们通过考察这一扩张对美国研究生教育以及大学城周边地方经济的影响，追溯了其全球涟漪效应。结合中国高考录取系统的行政数据和美国签证数据，我们利用中国大学录取的集中配额制度进行识别，并提出了三个关键发现。首先，中国本科教育的扩张推动了赴美研究生流动：中国每增加100名大学毕业生，就会带来3.6名中国研究生赴美。其次，中国硕士生产生了正向溢出效应，推动了新硕士项目的诞生，并增加了其他国际学生和美国硕士生的数量，尤其是在STEM领域。第三，国际学生的涌入支持了大学城周边的当地经济，也提高了大学以外的就业创造率。我们的发现突显了一个国家的国内教育政策如何通过学生迁移及其更广泛的溢出效应，重塑另一个国家的学术和经济格局。
34391.meta: Programs：DAE, DEV, ED, PE；JEL：F22, I23, J23, J24, J61, O15, O38

34390.title: Heterogeneity in Vertical Foreclosure: Evidence from the Chinese Film Industry
34390.zh_title: 纵向排挤的异质性：来自中国电影业的证据
34390.abstract: How do vertically integrated firms' pricing and product provision decisions change with upstream and downstream competition? We answer this question in the context of the Chinese film industry. Theaters allocate significantly fewer showings to non-integrated films. This foreclosure effect is particularly pronounced in two scenarios: when an integrated theater faces limited spatial competition, and when an integrated film is similar to competing films. To measure welfare effects, we estimate a model of consumer preferences and theater showings choice using a novel method that combines standard demand data with film ratings data. Our results show that integrated theaters internalize a substantial portion of their upstream profits, driving foreclosure behavior that distorts showings. Counterfactual simulations show that vertical integration increases consumer welfare by 2.4% in the median market, but reduces consumer welfare in 7% of markets. The welfare effects of foreclosure vary with upstream competition between films and downstream competition between theaters, and we show that targeted antitrust policy that removes of integration based on measures of market competition can substantially increase welfare.
34390.zh_abstract: 纵向一体化企业的定价和产品供给决策如何随上游和下游竞争而变化？我们在中国电影业的背景下回答这个问题。影院为非一体化电影分配的放映场次显著减少。这种排挤效应在两种情况下尤为突出：当一体化影院面临有限的空间竞争时，以及当一体化电影与竞争电影相似时。为了衡量福利效应，我们使用一种结合标准需求数据与电影评分数据的新方法，估计了消费者偏好和影院放映选择模型。我们的结果表明，一体化影院内部化了其上游利润的很大一部分，从而驱动了扭曲放映的排挤行为。反事实模拟显示，纵向一体化在中等市场使消费者福利提高了2.4%，但在7%的市场中降低了消费者福利。排挤的福利效应随电影之间的上游竞争和影院之间的下游竞争而变化，我们表明，基于市场竞争程度指标取消一体化的针对性反垄断政策可以大幅提高福利。

34389.title: The Economic Consequences of War
34389.abstract: This paper provides systematic evidence on the macroeconomic consequences of war using a new dataset covering 115 conflicts and 145 countries over the past 75 years. We document three main findings. First, conflict generates large and persistent real effects: real GDP falls by 13% on average with no recovery even after a decade, while investment collapses as financial frictions reduce domestic credit. The drop in real activity is more pronounced for civil wars than it is for interstate conflicts. Second, government finances deteriorate as revenues contract while expenditures remain stable, thus raising primary deficits. Real government debt also declines, and governments shift 1.2% of GDP towards short maturities. Third, governments rely heavily on inflation to finance their deficits: the price level and money supply both rise by nearly 50%, eroding debt and generating seigniorage but also depressing investment and raising the cost of imported capital goods.
34389.zh_abstract: 本文利用覆盖过去75年间145个国家115场冲突的新数据集，系统提供了战争宏观经济后果的证据。我们记录了三个主要发现。第一，冲突产生巨大且持续的实际影响：实际GDP平均下降13%，即使十年后也未见恢复，同时由于金融摩擦减少国内信贷，投资崩溃。内战对实际活动的下降幅度比国家间冲突更为显著。第二，政府财政恶化，因为收入收缩而支出保持稳定，从而提高了基本赤字。实际政府债务也下降，政府将1.2%的GDP转向短期债务。第三，政府严重依赖通胀为其赤字融资：物价水平和货币供应量均上升近50%，侵蚀债务并产生铸币税，但也抑制投资并提高进口资本品的成本。
34389.meta: Programs：EFG, IFM, ITI, ME；JEL：E51, E62, F51, H56

34388.title: The Impact of Cellphone Bans in Schools on Student Outcomes: Evidence from Florida
34388.zh_title: 学校手机禁令对学生成果的影响：来自佛罗里达州的证据
34388.abstract: Cellphone bans in schools have become a popular policy in recent years in the United States, yet very little is known about their effects on student outcomes. In this study, we try to fill this gap by examining the causal effects of bans on student test scores, suspensions, and absences using detailed student-level data from Florida and a quasi-experimental research strategy relying upon differences in pre-ban cellphone use by students, as measured by building-level Advan data. Several important findings emerge. First, we show that the enforcement of cellphone bans in schools led to a significant increase in student suspensions in the short-term, especially among Black students, but disciplinary actions began to dissipate after the first year, potentially suggesting a new steady state after an initial adjustment period. Second, we find significant improvements in student test scores in the second year of the ban after that initial adjustment period. Third, the findings suggest that cellphone bans in schools significantly reduce student unexcused absences, an effect that may explain a large fraction of the test score gains. The effects of cellphone bans are more pronounced in middle and high school settings where student smartphone ownership is more common.
34388.zh_abstract: 近年来，美国学校手机禁令已成为一项流行政策，但对其学生成果的影响知之甚少。在本研究中，我们试图通过利用佛罗里达州详细的学生层面数据以及基于建筑层面Advan数据测量的学生禁令前手机使用差异的准实验研究策略，来填补这一空白，考察禁令对学生考试成绩、停学和缺勤的因果效应。出现了几个重要发现。第一，我们表明，学校手机禁令的执行导致学生短期停学显著增加，尤其是在黑人学生中，但纪律处分在第一年后开始消散，这可能表明在初始调整期后达到了新的稳定状态。第二，我们发现在禁令的第二年，经过初始调整期后，学生考试成绩显著提高。第三，研究结果表明，学校手机禁令显著减少了学生无故缺勤，这一效应可能解释了考试成绩提升的很大一部分。手机禁令的效果在中学和高中环境中更为显著，因为这些环境中学生智能手机拥有率更高。

34383.title: Education and Selection into Ethnic Identification: Evidence from Roma People in Romania
34383.zh_title: 教育与族群认同的选择：来自罗马尼亚罗姆人的证据
34383.authors: Andreea Mitrut, Gabriel Kreindler, Margareta Matache, Andrei Munteanu, Cristian Pop-Eleches
34383.abstract: How does ethnic identification vary with education among disadvantaged minorities? We study this question for Roma people, Europe's largest ethnic minority, using linked Romanian census data and birth records. We measure how individuals change reported ethnicity over time, or “pass.” Roma identification strongly declines with education, from 80% for those with no education to 40% for postsecondary graduates. We estimate a model with persistent individual heterogeneity and find 3-6 times more Roma postsecondary graduates than in official data. Survey data we collect shows that most Romanians are unaware of these patterns. Such selective passing may reinforce stereotypes about marginalized groups.
34383.zh_abstract: 在弱势少数群体中，族群认同如何随教育程度变化？我们利用关联的罗马尼亚人口普查数据和出生记录，针对欧洲最大的少数族群罗姆人研究这一问题。我们衡量个体随时间改变报告族群身份的情况，即“隐瞒”。罗姆人认同随教育程度强烈下降，从无教育者的80%降至高等教育毕业生的40%。我们估计了一个包含个体持续异质性的模型，发现罗姆人高等教育毕业生数量是官方数据的3-6倍。我们收集的调查数据显示，大多数罗马尼亚人不知道这些模式。这种选择性隐瞒可能强化对边缘群体的刻板印象。

34381.title: Complexity Theory and Economic Inequality
34381.zh_title: 复杂性理论与经济不平等
34381.authors: Steven N. Durlauf, David McMillon, Scott Page
34381.abstract: We analyze the potential for complexity theory to produce insights that elucidate the evolution of socioeconomic inequality and point toward effective policies. We position complexity theory as a complement to more traditional economic approaches. Economic models of inequality can fall into four broad categories: models based on individual attributes and technologies, social interaction models, intergenerational models of transfer, and models of institutional and social structure. Within each of these categories, complexity theory can enhance traditional theory. It is of particular value in helping to distinguish between bottom-up systemic and top-down structural causes of inequality. Complexity theory can further enrich our understanding of economic inequality by adopting a complex adaptive system of systems approach in which economic, social, political, and psychosocial systems interact with one another and with institutional and social structures to produce robust inequality, particularly on racial lines.
34381.zh_abstract: 我们分析了复杂性理论在阐明社会经济不平等演变并指向有效政策方面的潜力。我们将复杂性理论定位为对更传统经济方法的补充。经济不平等模型大致可分为四类：基于个体属性和技术的模型、社会互动模型、代际转移模型以及制度和社会结构模型。在每一类中，复杂性理论都能增强传统理论。它在帮助区分不平等的自下而上系统性和自上而下结构性原因方面尤其有价值。复杂性理论可以通过采用复杂适应系统之系统方法进一步丰富我们对经济不平等的理解，在这种方法中，经济、社会、政治和社会心理系统相互互动，并与制度和社会结构互动，产生顽固的不平等，尤其是种族方面的不平等。

34399.title: Stimulus through Insurance: the Marginal Propensity to Repay Debt
34399.zh_title: 通过保险进行刺激：偿还债务的边际倾向
34399.authors: Gizem Koşar, Davide Melcangi, Laura Pilossoph, David G. Wiczer
34399.abstract: Using detailed microdata, we document that households often use “stimulus” checks to pay down debt, especially those with low net wealth-to-income ratios. To rationalize these patterns, we introduce an empirically plausible borrowing price schedule into an otherwise standard incomplete markets model. Because interest rates rise with debt, borrowers have increasingly larger incentives to use an additional dollar to reduce debt service payments rather than consume. Using our calibrated model, we then study whether and how this marginal propensity to repay debt (MPRD) alters the aggregate implications of fiscal transfers. We uncover a trade-off between stimulus and insurance, as high–debt individuals gain considerably from transfers, but consume relatively little immediately. This mechanism lowers the immediate stimulus effect of fiscal transfers, but sustains aggregate consumption for longer.
34399.zh_abstract: 利用详细的微观数据，我们记录了家庭经常使用“刺激”支票来偿还债务，尤其是那些净财富与收入比率较低的家庭。为了合理化这些模式，我们将一个经验上可信的借贷价格表引入到一个原本标准的不完全市场模型中。由于利率随债务增加而上升，借款人使用额外一美元来减少偿债支出而非消费的激励越来越大。利用我们校准后的模型，我们随后研究了这种偿还债务的边际倾向（MPRD）是否以及如何改变财政转移支付的总体影响。我们揭示了刺激与保险之间的权衡，因为高负债个体从转移支付中获益颇丰，但立即消费相对较少。这一机制降低了财政转移支付的即时刺激效应，但使总消费得以更持久地维持。

34397.title: The Austerity Threshold
34397.authors: Vadim Elenev, Tim Landvoigt, Stijn Van Nieuwerburgh
34397.abstract: We introduce a new indicator of fiscal capacity—the “austerity threshold”: the debt-to-GDP level above which the government must raise fiscal surpluses to ensure debt safety. In a model with realistic risk premia, nominal rigidities, and an intermediary sector, calibrated to the U.S., we estimate this threshold at 189%. We highlight the roles of safety premia and intermediation-driven convenience yields. The threshold varies with the source of surpluses: spending cuts reduce inflation and allow low interest rates, while tax increases distort labor supply and raise inflation. Uncertainty over the austerity regime—spending cuts or tax increases—sharply lowers fiscal capacity. The expected austerity regime affects asset prices and macro outcomes even when debt-to-GDP is well below the threshold.
34397.zh_abstract: 我们引入了一个新的财政能力指标——“紧缩阈值”：即债务与GDP之比超过该水平时，政府必须提高财政盈余以确保债务安全。在一个包含现实风险溢价、名义刚性和中介部门、并针对美国进行校准的模型中，我们估计该阈值为189%。我们强调了安全溢价和中介驱动的便利收益率的作用。该阈值随盈余来源而变化：削减支出会降低通胀并允许低利率，而增税则会扭曲劳动供给并推高通胀。关于紧缩制度（削减支出或增税）的不确定性会急剧降低财政能力。即使债务与GDP之比远低于阈值，预期的紧缩制度也会影响资产价格和宏观经济结果。
34397.meta: Programs：AP, EFG, PE；JEL：E10, E40, E60, G12, G18, G2
